subject: You haven’t answered our urgent call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Democrats are counting on you...
| You _still_ haven’t joined the Anti-Trump Task Force?! ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4) Democratic HEROES like Hakeem Jeffries need EVERY loyal Democrat in their corner!

**That’s why we’re STUNNED to see you still haven’t signed on... it’s our only chance to fight back against Trump!**

[**You have one more hour to correct this: Add your name now to join our Anti-Trump Task Force »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4) | [YOUR SIGNATURE NOT FOUND: SIGN NOW TO JOIN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
---
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
⬇️ Folks, DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS BREAKING NEWS ⬇️
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
**Democrats are organizing like never before to STOP TRUMP — _and we DESPERATELY need your help!_**

[**We need 150 Democrats to join the Anti-Trump Task Force IMMEDIATELY. As a top Democrat, will you step up and do your part? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
[150 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: JOIN THE ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE TO HELP DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
---
Republicans are in control of the House, Senate, _AND_ White House.

This means it will take all of us — _including you_ — to fight back. **Democratic heroes like Hakeem Jeffries are COUNTING on us!**

We’re URGENTLY rounding up top Democrats to join our Anti-Trump Task Force, _and we can’t do this without you..._

[**Please, friend: Click here to join the Anti-Trump Task Force! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
[150 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: JOIN THE ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE TO HELP DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/anti-trump-task-force/?source=VPP_20250524_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19936%2E878179%2ENx3cE4)
---

subject: Stop Activist Judges Sabotaging Trump!
body:
President Donald Trump won a landslide victory to secure our borders, cut waste, and put America First.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE2TojAQhn9NcpNKOh_AIYd1rexhHacsD1MeQ0gkDhEICOO_n9JxvHY_3e9Tr4l9G_xNoXyNAJpQjwgAsT8IYDguMV3P8f-_1dtAvlaD3EVx38LfJzrDC75Yc_pcH_Zy15TjiR791g37mb7w6da7F_wMzVw0ob1P8w2uFfM14dgpmvOCMkk5xY0ShfXckEqwijjnBaOekFL4CkpgFgAHBQQEESAIBaBFJksDwKzNKwYFJSXi5JGTmehSsIaO02JS6rqY2S7iVjXT1I8PMY1AL6nLLlfbuuv4c2a7iEA_lRHoGYG2x490EfqQJGL6URrbnFkltXvnW5xU3S-hbcMoc8TJ6fcNnhV8BwAA__8WuW4J)
| | [****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjzGPnDAQhX-N6UD2GOyloMgFbYokJ51SXXUytgFfmDVrG8j--8ir1RbXvvk-vXkK18WNt47IFwIwOxMJAOHfCMD1_cCwfeLPH-XvK_1XXsUrNvkK3x_oDk_4otX09-XPm3id2zix9_GXvb7t7Imn22qf8KO0sqjcklPZF6bjo6F1YTsm6xPjgtWsmLtRSKkaToWtWyaHUYihNpw17ARDy2hbuA4oNLSBhjIAdqpEqwC41nLgcGK0JTW991QKbXBasZgOFYL3WGmPxdLNKa3x_tiZwHkM1hqPh0p6roLd90r7HB_l52YmW0YbnI1Q4lB6zAo_bwk_ot-CtoT3X0ECIt_RGrch4X2W7olWuCo3XQjvcSAgFPrtkgjvoXkQyYZsAG1q-XEEVoTOrIdbFheFJDWd7rPyiL2D_wEAAP__qK2MOQ)
[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjzGPnDAQhX-N6UD2GOyloMgFbYokJ51SXXUytgFfmDVrG8j--8ir1RbXvvk-vXkK18WNt47IFwIwOxMJAOHfCMD1_cCwfeLPH-XvK_1XXsUrNvkK3x_oDk_4otX09-XPm3id2zix9_GXvb7t7Imn22qf8KO0sqjcklPZF6bjo6F1YTsm6xPjgtWsmLtRSKkaToWtWyaHUYihNpw17ARDy2hbuA4oNLSBhjIAdqpEqwC41nLgcGK0JTW991QKbXBasZgOFYL3WGmPxdLNKa3x_tiZwHkM1hqPh0p6roLd90r7HB_l52YmW0YbnI1Q4lB6zAo_bwk_ot-CtoT3X0ECIt_RGrch4X2W7olWuCo3XQjvcSAgFPrtkgjvoXkQyYZsAG1q-XEEVoTOrIdbFheFJDWd7rPyiL2D_wEAAP__qK2MOQ) Patriot,

President Donald Trump won a landslide victory to secure our borders, cut waste, and put America First. **But unelected, lawless federal judges are defying the will of the people,** blocking his every move with outrageous rulings that threaten our nation’s future.

In Washington, D.C., Obama federal James Boasberg halted deportation flights for alleged gang members on March 24, 2025, demanding “due process” for criminals tied to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua. In Rhode Island, Judge Mary McElroy’s April 3, 2025, ruling stopped Trump from clawing back $11 billion in bloated COVID-19 funds, siding with 23 Democrat states. **And across the country, judges are issuing nationwide injunctions to block Trump’s executive order ending birthright citizenship for children of illegals.**

**This is judicial tyranny, and[**Freedom Watch is fighting back.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjzGPnDAQhX-N6UD2GOyloMgFbYokJ51SXXUytgFfmDVrG8j--8ir1RbXvvk-vXkK18WNt47IFwIwOxMJAOHfCMD1_cCwfeLPH-XvK_1XXsUrNvkK3x_oDk_4otX09-XPm3id2zix9_GXvb7t7Imn22qf8KO0sqjcklPZF6bjo6F1YTsm6xPjgtWsmLtRSKkaToWtWyaHUYihNpw17ARDy2hbuA4oNLSBhjIAdqpEqwC41nLgcGK0JTW991QKbXBasZgOFYL3WGmPxdLNKa3x_tiZwHkM1hqPh0p6roLd90r7HB_l52YmW0YbnI1Q4lB6zAo_bwk_ot-CtoT3X0ECIt_RGrch4X2W7olWuCo3XQjvcSAgFPrtkgjvoXkQyYZsAG1q-XEEVoTOrIdbFheFJDWd7rPyiL2D_wEAAP__qK2MOQ)** Our Department of Judicial and Legal Accountability (DOLA) is mobilizing Citizen Grand Juries and filing lawsuits to hold these rogue judges accountable. **[**But we need patriots like you to join the fight.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjzGPnDAQhX-N6UD2GOyloMgFbYokJ51SXXUytgFfmDVrG8j--8ir1RbXvvk-vXkK18WNt47IFwIwOxMJAOHfCMD1_cCwfeLPH-XvK_1XXsUrNvkK3x_oDk_4otX09-XPm3id2zix9_GXvb7t7Imn22qf8KO0sqjcklPZF6bjo6F1YTsm6xPjgtWsmLtRSKkaToWtWyaHUYihNpw17ARDy2hbuA4oNLSBhjIAdqpEqwC41nLgcGK0JTW991QKbXBasZgOFYL3WGmPxdLNKa3x_tiZwHkM1hqPh0p6roLd90r7HB_l52YmW0YbnI1Q4lB6zAo_bwk_ot-CtoT3X0ECIt_RGrch4X2W7olWuCo3XQjvcSAgFPrtkgjvoXkQyYZsAG1q-XEEVoTOrIdbFheFJDWd7rPyiL2D_wEAAP__qK2MOQ)**

**[**Your $25, $50, or $100 donation to DOJO will fuel our legal battles to stop this judicial coup and defend Trump’s America First agenda.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjzGPnDAQhX-N6UD2GOyloMgFbYokJ51SXXUytgFfmDVrG8j--8ir1RbXvvk-vXkK18WNt47IFwIwOxMJAOHfCMD1_cCwfeLPH-XvK_1XXsUrNvkK3x_oDk_4otX09-XPm3id2zix9_GXvb7t7Imn22qf8KO0sqjcklPZF6bjo6F1YTsm6xPjgtWsmLtRSKkaToWtWyaHUYihNpw17ARDy2hbuA4oNLSBhjIAdqpEqwC41nLgcGK0JTW991QKbXBasZgOFYL3WGmPxdLNKa3x_tiZwHkM1hqPh0p6roLd90r7HB_l52YmW0YbnI1Q4lB6zAo_bwk_ot-CtoT3X0ECIt_RGrch4X2W7olWuCo3XQjvcSAgFPrtkgjvoXkQyYZsAG1q-XEEVoTOrIdbFheFJDWd7rPyiL2D_wEAAP__qK2MOQ)****Join Freedom Watch today and help us restore judicial integrity and accountability!**

clean_body: President Donald Trump won a landslide victory to secure our borders, cut waste, and put America First. | | Patriot, President Donald Trump won a landslide victory to secure our borders, cut waste, and put America First. But unelected, lawless federal judges are defying the will of the people, blocking his every move with outrageous rulings that threaten our nation’s future. In Washington, D.C., Obama federal James Boasberg halted deportation flights for alleged gang members on March 24, 2025, demanding “due process” for criminals tied to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua. In Rhode Island, Judge Mary McElroy’s April 3, 2025, ruling stopped Trump from clawing back $11 billion in bloated COVID-19 funds, siding with 23 Democrat states. And across the country, judges are issuing nationwide injunctions to block Trump’s executive order ending birthright citizenship for children of illegals. This is judicial tyranny, and Our Department of Judicial and Legal Accountability (DOLA) is mobilizing Citizen Grand Juries and filing lawsuits to hold these rogue judges accountable. Freedom Watch today and help us restore judicial integrity and accountability! For Liberty, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

name: Phil Izon
subject: Happy Memorial Day and a huge thank you.
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832809291163e2b61c22c55&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68327e4fb40d4f5cabdf2da9%26ss_email_id%3D6832809291163e2b61c22c55%26ss_campaign_name%3DHappy%2BMemorial%2BDay%2Band%2Ba%2Bhuge%2Bthank%2Byou.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-25T02%253A30%253A01Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68327e4fb40d4f5cabdf2da9&l=en-US&s=TPt_53V5JJ0abDDT6JPcGVYP3H0%3D) |
---|---
|
#### This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—**honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people**.
#### But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten.
#### The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a **stampede of giveaways**. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the **National Education Association** and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling.
#### What was the dividend meant to do?
The **Permanent Fund Dividend** was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a **slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests.**
#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832809291163e2b61c22c55&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68327e4fb40d4f5cabdf2da9&l=en-US&s=ioiPr933Jm4Q3sARqfuC0PmMtf8%3D)
---
#### [**Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832809291163e2b61c22c55&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68327e4fb40d4f5cabdf2da9&l=en-US&s=ioiPr933Jm4Q3sARqfuC0PmMtf8%3D)
---
#### **In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy.**
#### But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation?
What if it was your own government?
#### This film asks the billion-dollar question:
**What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability?**
#### We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like **Arabella Advisors** , **Alaska Venture Fund** , and the **1630 Fund**.
#### It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence.
**$25 billion gone** —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska.
#### This is _The Permanent Short_.
#### More announcements coming soon.
**Thank you for being part of this journey.**
---
[_ _ Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832809291163e2b61c22c55&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68327e4fb40d4f5cabdf2da9&l=en-US&s=ioiPr933Jm4Q3sARqfuC0PmMtf8%3D)
---
|

### **If you purchased an Angel Ticket or Golden Ticket you do not need to buy a ticket to any event or future movie.**
### **Thank You, Phil Izon**
---
#### This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—**honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people**.
#### But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten.
#### The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a **stampede of giveaways**. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the **National Education Association** and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling.
#### What was the dividend meant to do?
The **Permanent Fund Dividend** was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a **slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests.**
#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left’s lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day.

Peter, I won't sugarcoat this. I'm in the fight of my life.

The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country.

I've already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, **[and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3qe_Ag6BKW-6CtQ01iAiBdYMRIAX3nHXXkxlDF2wDWRVMEaobVk3nsO5PALUxMYklyKkI8D9GWUlOoATHWsY6ThvtKP0e5XuBNI-PQLRwIgBAMBV5riIgX-9Oj0txp1LjxhdMxqt4TcMRDXdmbQM04uGtITF8cgD3YBUPRlzrIlcy0rHbN80wiH0ryYsm7OAFcfZsJbOHMXEq5aLCmqSUZKAsEsEPS71heH_BKj9-LrkWXrgLklRu8daei0jawQKPdfUd3wS17wIyJMWw5dZAVEzWZnTidSk-HTbR6EKIC9IAZ5q4vVE6o65GughRVUfFq7t4kn24L_hQla2STRmd9ytgbAvF6qZoaalvQQZQQbDYa3MvbGxq5Xi9DwECDoZ2_LoMTAufTINzdQJzPB4XVdUfhd6obM_wh5PazxtYPDGWwXMLm7LlswgjkBqSPILcqgUifMVjcJo2tYeI3cPu2P1z2QBfcMHk62nDSvxRkiM9eIVs_O7Pax6TMmlffhmoFRTaECACPrAv4rG26XlajMgtdqFU4ZopQaYC72Soi9Z8ZGkuB9K4mwrJwuX6YnsDshUgZqu/P4bPLY9BqKqtzFELbA7HdunMG1WbA34H/9)**

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zu39j2ksbomcp8407rbk3tndcruv6vti65dmgg18_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z11rv2h2souqlemvkqo1t0aj77unqmeqjktc3ob0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2za2hqifgs90cm840lguttt3360osr4kv4n1a8pd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zeaoqqupolj8r78lpf8fu1o0e35a8l9cle30bjpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt8ek23a9saupsf4vdg9ke1qkrcn50to5b6ji880_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3go36rb4v2li53mhkvufhga6igqpr39p75mni5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zc2mga7155fackfjjh648birj47e8leuu8e3r0u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5hsjc9q1jsmqavt06ibuf3au1ppv85n69q7qhog_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zktj59hsgqipuc3akmi9a9ck9no9dmge7dbj1fqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrhs9hkd6p9uj7e99a4bvfrenm5usn2907rooe0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3c1h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztbrure7rl45fjiq31roud1hp9l49odvrlmgfbno_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1c3i66pr2cdg649fg)

If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs8o7de7880s9skq16hn9jvkvn673ve1ojr61ar8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2re9ekr5im0e9he6o8qutlj69mdk704an18djdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbskfhrtdtfps7jqq7dkfod0t5lrmk2g9nquvdhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2sc0q73nf6ql75roc90jksj0b4ms2s8pg16n2u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6brkjat3401i098ni10j1nu1rtf3enkknils6po_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpi4r4bppivcoo5bf9eoid1amhvmlb5mdjr725po_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zes0qgillpma5kke83bs1d87kv3c2ppkdfcsku18_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztm2kralhgl5bg8nvoeortaj0492c29bjnr40828_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf808t6ct012pa1qcotc5gaqptgbqqbp3966qo7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6r7h3ia9r20uqjncf0ic6icgugutv2sgbm9jaso_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z88q70rrdun9ca3ibredg6h39u7bdq9plepdrrbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdb9lhvgb9nnuooajq9q92sfp9uhai3f136379kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjm3epdhqa9ldcudf0i3fb3q269l4919sm752r48_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp3c1sueqjtaqa7uq4oi3pm4505q7ta8jkuafc28_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj3cdh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo5pg7dl4krl4hqisq0tdkcpknmhkdnv2dug7pc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmk6f89jardanvjarpfpil3qdr6ec821qrbtqne8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zioffn8f3mj0h7v12s37vevpheil9a9c3shq9pv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7k4hb87fpd5vkou9pu4lcmt6k2rfapsb7ace9l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdmfp69lp2bctt5tjv16p33udq5bqr66njecamg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn5esv1o6il5objchui9pfj0ddsltbg64d3mksuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs9ivgt6qq9chj3gdhkpivc24e9k1no23ac51iio_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0hj6lq73qjbegpibcqolrre60bp6jc9v0k31j6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl5dttes60tvt7olkvrndmk4c81e5k0a9gqhauqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqt7kiak7kodmasfvac3chtrt0c185tqogogcqe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z59bnap4jdom8biolsn71rkbbvonri9d8p1ljjb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbsqkt5p78skahnfhpqa0vhsulo9jfrbovl8a33o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)**

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Arrested for a sweatshirt
body:
What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American.

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7cfhse28lj9eoa4f32uba2b0r4mvrhcqh2i5m30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,What just happened outside a Massachusetts courthouse should concern every American. **One of our clients, Erica Walsh, was arrested — for peacefully wearing a sweatshirt while standing on a public sidewalk.** She wasn’t blocking doors. She wasn’t shouting. She wasn’t breaking the law. She stood silently near the Norfolk Superior Courthouse — where public attention is currently focused due to the ongoing Karen Read trial — on a sidewalk that a federal court has ruled protesters have a constitutional right to be. But Massachusetts State Police arrested her anyway. I’m Mark Trammell, CEO of the **Center for American Liberty** , and we’re stepping in to make sure the state doesn’t get away with it. Just days before Erica’s arrest, another one of our clients, Jason Grant, was blocked from the very same area simply for holding a sign with a Bible verse. This is not an isolated incident. This is a pattern. **State officials are targeting peaceful Americans for expressing viewpoints state officials don’t like — even after a federal appellate court said they have every right to be there.** We’ve already won a major court victory affirming the First Amendment in this case. But now, Massachusetts officials are ignoring the ruling — and doubling down on their crackdown. We’re taking them back to court. And we need your help. **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation to help us defend Erica, hold the state accountable, and protect the First Amendment for all Americans? ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj9tm5pajfke6jihmc6n163vu446hspevfddegpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cth2bs)**Your support will help us:
---
* Defend Erica and Jason in court
* Enforce the federal ruling protecting peaceful protest
* Send a message that constitutional rights don’t disappear when the government finds them inconvenient

---
| | At the Center for American Liberty, we fight every day to protect Americans from government overreach, ideological intimidation, and unlawful censorship. But we don’t take government money. We rely entirely on the support of people like you. **[If you believe in the Constitution — if you believe in standing up when others are silenced — please join us.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsf5re8cubmj2do19frid614q2vp6jv77rlsmmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cth2bs)** **Because if we don’t hold the line here, the government will keep pushing further.** Thank you for standing with us. Sincerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell ** CEO, Center for American Liberty
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z376dgc89u450p4e7ie1rr71n74cd7hpjui85djo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cth2bs)

---
|
---
| | **Mark Trammell **CEO, Center for American Liberty
---
|
---
| | P.S. We’ve already won one court victory in this case. Now it’s time to enforce it — and defend the rights of peaceful Americans like Erica and Jason. [**Your donation today will help us fight back.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgq596ou8c2v987ja7bejpbuip106f2bg3h7idg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cth2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq3vgeu7cdi2d6v7e8b1casul5pd6ougqjgh4geg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj7cjh2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl0kea7mffejpipnklahpn5jsbe7j2dar08opbb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj7cjh2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg7ga1e4grf4fbshb894s5nt4sprmbv1ff2idg2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj7cjh2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt2ghlebh1djbr0ku92llht48ut7vudko2od4ta0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt14q1ntm6bsvjlorsmvpj0qotnmve1f1e66t6co_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpsk40hcmii503lics8vgm94liqipi4ktlq3ta8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqsc006q6dd1oulgdl7afnd6gml3bqa2rks7r16g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcuhf5cpfco3hbsv56s1hmb7bpss1ilves3upkp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9e7icc52ngv2fd09602a55gnkrd90h3718pu78g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zksh6vlnsrqkj3h957r7md3dol7dmddf44bahddg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhmeoj5cdh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsvq469jttgve03v4mnjam2l8d0soojk3g1ieom8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zomrblh6k0b3bbcvkdoslo8nv11482i93ik348sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zququhm4c2uuiq22sbr1hlbjp28c1svsdo553ddo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg84csb4dauqd8v89no3o0u9ns78lgm2pomsls7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrgu4141s48fv0ohftilhd5p6j3306q348i57v80_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk7kmt0jliuemqn7u74srpi3njtldi69f69pu44g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgr6jtd1cqjdip8ir7bgdj83r3jthvp6d5ifjm88_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2cmvdop406rrj5tidohi08o8otkpgn0t85biot8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z43j8qgfpji37h5s4maa1in1ok61qcfoc8ncpseg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7cctlkkrrmj43pgvk8g0o46s3vqbkd45iu5g6r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj6tmk6dmvt363o4tucqepdlt3klm7rptkpiae58_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5o50hj0080bb51estnt1fjaopbku158ub4gnntg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z128n4na85927fnpv9d3ueus71nvi4vthtrnluv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z82bfm10rrtr4nmbsf5fki1g66g1mgfe14kcm63g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlvne8ubp2gr3kg79tjhipbba482cj1osnsjerlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7avu46495k6dq8as27lj2ftc3e16iv71k6n37mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsth0lbaljq6jc7nqfk7l2hlv1alr401bdbdht38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9rar4dqvcaquhqjmamq86a54r6bl17rb12qvcg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p34cjh2bs)
---|---|---

Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|--- Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk9q84g6q26086lt2qg70hdaepmvkv5ri4rkfehg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0l88atvsvja1728t384ula5n5uit5su7oldlnlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvd8pfbficeav6b3v1noie9huvci5gs6vn486328_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0jqk9dto5l6cte5faiuhhn0pggviu2t6rivdaqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmjuq7l70l51v8far392m5n4e6ed2mhfd8u4nsso_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7evt6l3tgt7v42gdb1k92jm3qe5v18ig714ol6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shhm1p32chh2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znssdd3e5lje14l4enn3k3n1hv3stmj3ogfo5bqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1pn779r2u138qaf116m1n8j4ofjv8gj7tclkh30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zavgru66d472tobhi5jao5ilmbi71m2n18uoe9co_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9v5nd81po5hd8j8kc2c8lnn3fsecr4aam9icm6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmfpf1vdghn9vuprkqvgvdb74s4lop187u8j5f5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zae62qf4dmma1av3lv0kp1v8amsdt6ocria0fb20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zugj6p90djd26dc1so8oobrv5aud10kr83eiln2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za5s59v75qeqepi51riej2l2v8a459ptdktvcck0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg5kn2dmujrdl932jhj9asd4o665lrlonlltdqu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmpiu1bgutakrvn0pei19pp71fq0tbt1p2aff1o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z16t8f8ogls6g092d0otsv31rnvnqj9qr4eoekbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjnam3bfbkm221m6qj6vf0q5ffm3mnhbrll7ce5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmb2eu955pkp8cdgm8uppvos4b3fl4b994e9330o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3o10i07nce0m8b3nnig8tpr13i9dpfg3ih542t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cth2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcu818d3u94tj781re80lrvuqis1g9hu33igboio_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm4gdqvo800l8d6oat75itnmujd8fbrbqp6hnuk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu0m53i6aputl3mntlmtb8l0s2scbau7gf1je260_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

name: Kristi Rogers
subject: Our family of service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is something that can’t be taken away from us

Friend, being a part of a military family is something that my husband, Mike Rogers, and I both value beyond measure.

Mike is the third of four generations in his family to serve in the United States military.

His uncle served, his father served, he and his brother served, and now our son is proudly serving our great nation in the United States Navy.

On my side, my father and his three brothers all served, and my mom's dad, my grandpa, was a Navy submariner at Pearl Harbor during the attack. I also proudly deployed to Iraq while working for the Department of Defense.

And now that Mike is running in **[the most competitive Senate race in the country,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z046v1cva79s75encatj2begnc0tsli9j5jdco20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)** it's those military values that keep us grounded.

Unlike the radical left democrats, we won't tell bald-faced lies just to score political points.

**[We value the truth.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlobfnul4jebo0u3tf2m8p0p4gvvk63o4o5ic55g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)**

Unlike radical left democrats, we don't consider elected positions to be mechanisms for self-interest.

**[We value service.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgetg7a05a03nmnna1k5scbvcconud7guvdti5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)**

And unlike radical left democrats, we won't sell America out to the highest bidder.

**[We value American freedom.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj21isup4asuiirtfg027l83jk20sj7sghmkkqa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)**

We're in this fight because we know 2026 is our chance to **keep the Senate majority** -- and **[keep fighting for the Conservative agenda that you deserve.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7m4qs2p7h5pmd3gbo5iqkoiqaffrssrvvt83ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)**

**[If, like us, you believe in your heart of hearts that America was, is and always will be the greatest nation on earth, we sure could use your support.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9pbr9pfg0a0vlhksa3jesnmjoqh7i2g5m5var0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)**

So, what do you say? Will you join Mike and me on the frontlines of the fight for the soul of our great nation?

******************************************************[JOIN THE FIGHT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkg0tu5h6btbva8eacue3tknabovkf7638qc6c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjm0o74cph2bs)******************************************************

Your support means more to us than you'll ever know,

Kristi Rogers
