name: Phil Izon
subject: Will VVSG 2.0 Kill RCV?
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832c99c55cb3777e20f4b83&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6832c665b062e23def54f265%26ss_email_id%3D6832c99c55cb3777e20f4b83%26ss_campaign_name%3DWill%2BVVSG%2B2.0%2BKill%2BRCV%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-25T07%253A41%253A22Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6832c665b062e23def54f265&l=en-US&s=ziqcCrNqQvbDcTagzfFQlpr6Pqg%3D) |
---|---
|
### **Will VVSG 2.0 Kill RCV?**
---
---
|
---
Conducting a **Risk-Limiting Audit (RLA)** for a **Ranked Choice Voting (RCV)** election, especially with a large number of voters like 400,000, does indeed introduce **serious complexity, cost, and implementation challenges** compared to RLAs for single-choice plurality elections. The core challenge is that with RCV, the audit must **verify ballot rankings and the entire elimination sequence** that determined the final winner, not just confirm the top vote-getter based on first choices.The **VVSG (Voluntary Voting System Guidelines) 2.0** guidelines, adopted by the **EAC (U.S. Election Assistance Commission)** , require that voting systems produce records that **facilitate RLAs** , enabling verification of election outcomes through statistically significant sampling. Principle 9 of VVSG 2.0 focuses on auditable systems that enable evidence-based elections, explicitly supporting **all types of audits, including risk-limiting audits (RLAs)** , and requiring machine support for post-election audits.Regarding recommendations for election officials facing the intersection of RCV complexity and RLA requirements, the sources suggest the following:
* **Ensure the voting system supports Ballot-Comparison RLAs**. This is presented as potentially more efficient than Ballot-Polling RLAs, which require much larger sample sizes (tens of thousands of ballots for 400,000 voters).
* Critically, the voting system must be capable of generating and exporting **ballot-level Cast Vote Records (CVRs)** that include each voter's full ranking. The system must also allow for secure ballot tracking and the ability to match individual physical ballots to their corresponding digital CVRs. VVSG 2.0 requires voting systems to have the capability of importing or exporting CVRs according to Common Data Format (CDF) specifications. The VVSG also states that vendors should demonstrate how their system provides all necessary information for an independent RLA.
* Maintain **secure ballot tracking** and a **transparent audit trail**. VVSG 2.0 requires systems to produce records in support of audits and specifies requirements for audit support documentation. It also addresses data protection for audit records like CVRs and ballot images.
* Ensure **election officials are trained in RCV-specific auditing** procedures. VVSG 2.0 includes requirements for manufacturers to specify training requirements for election officials and workers, and to provide clear, complete, and detailed instructions for system operations, including how to use accessibility features.
* Be aware that conducting RLAs with RCV is **not yet standardized nationally**. Very few jurisdictions have attempted them, and some have had to rely on **manual full recounts** instead due to audit difficulties.

In summary, the sources imply that while VVSG 2.0 requires systems to support RLAs and RCV tabulation is a function voting systems must be capable of handling, the key to performing RLAs on RCV elections efficiently, particularly at scale, lies in **having a voting system that specifically supports the necessary data generation (ballot-level CVRs) and linking capabilities required for ballot-comparison audits** , along with properly trained personnel. Without these system capabilities, conducting an RLA for RCV becomes significantly more challenging and costly, potentially necessitating large ballot samples or manual recounts.
---
### **Groups Funding & Supporting Ranked Choice Voting**
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon
12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113
Eagle River 99577
United States [ Unsubscribe ](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6832c99c55cb3777e20f4b83&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2F0jx76UYxE828i6KM5kzSEP7L6Gh8VLkSAiNWfNKLwNbjy5raJz2U5JaesvRTGpc8FSTX3MVWLWxHbXb67uucmmVQ-UTw3nwrA43-ydUcHIidMl3AdDQuwyrkXdyTobWdz5lOT7J6IT1rYHFWHX4MVN1gjsrXlh7D-cL3CruEvCdj0-2Xi6maY1HeE8epP4X25ioYo7Xu4SZPxHFtFd9y3yXpPyaeK6jb_Gni6LziFtCAu_rYNHKj0EKRQBXkzidrRjfgRrIdd702LWK9reqBm2rzhf-swgqefPrf9ynWOdiiCrEUAAK8ig9PVnMim0PK2-Og7lIACMt9Tvoh0DmGUm3YSW9IDX1MdWGEEYtjyfzzfkN2fmq7WIo%3D&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6832c665b062e23def54f265&l=en-US&s=HW8V-2YrN06A8nCfoQhR9zl7J-k%3D)

clean_body: Please send to your friends and family | | | | | ---|--- | Will VVSG 2.0 Kill RCV? | Conducting a Risk-Limiting Audit (RLA) for a Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) election, especially with a large number of voters like 400,000, does indeed introduce serious complexity, cost, and implementation challenges compared to RLAs for single-choice plurality elections. The core challenge is that with RCV, the audit must verify ballot rankings and the entire elimination sequence that determined the final winner, not just confirm the top vote-getter based on first choices.The VVSG (Voluntary Voting System Guidelines) 2.0 guidelines, adopted by the EAC (U.S. Election Assistance Commission) , require that voting systems produce records that facilitate RLAs , enabling verification of election outcomes through statistically significant sampling. Principle 9 of VVSG 2.0 focuses on auditable systems that enable evidence-based elections, explicitly supporting all types of audits, including risk-limiting audits (RLAs) , and requiring machine support for post-election audits.Regarding recommendations for election officials facing the intersection of RCV complexity and RLA requirements, the sources suggest the following: Ensure the voting system supports Ballot-Comparison RLAs. This is presented as potentially more efficient than Ballot-Polling RLAs, which require much larger sample sizes (tens of thousands of ballots for 400,000 voters). Critically, the voting system must be capable of generating and exporting ballot-level Cast Vote Records (CVRs) that include each voter's full ranking. The system must also allow for secure ballot tracking and the ability to match individual physical ballots to their corresponding digital CVRs. VVSG 2.0 requires voting systems to have the capability of importing or exporting CVRs according to Common Data Format (CDF) specifications. The VVSG also states that vendors should demonstrate how their system provides all necessary information for an independent RLA. Maintain secure ballot tracking and a transparent audit trail. VVSG 2.0 requires systems to produce records in support of audits and specifies requirements for audit support documentation. It also addresses data protection for audit records like CVRs and ballot images. Ensure election officials are trained in RCV-specific auditing procedures. VVSG 2.0 includes requirements for manufacturers to specify training requirements for election officials and workers, and to provide clear, complete, and detailed instructions for system operations, including how to use accessibility features. Be aware that conducting RLAs with RCV is not yet standardized nationally. Very few jurisdictions have attempted them, and some have had to rely on manual full recounts instead due to audit difficulties. In summary, the sources imply that while VVSG 2.0 requires systems to support RLAs and RCV tabulation is a function voting systems must be capable of handling, the key to performing RLAs on RCV elections efficiently, particularly at scale, lies in having a voting system that specifically supports the necessary data generation (ballot-level CVRs) and linking capabilities required for ballot-comparison audits , along with properly trained personnel. Without these system capabilities, conducting an RLA for RCV becomes significantly more challenging and costly, potentially necessitating large ballot samples or manual recounts. Groups Funding & Supporting Ranked Choice Voting** | | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfb76m1u332opg2qrnf0avhm08ftojs0drollsjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgp6jk451ktgvdocfj1oho5botj54ubsirbpl9h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp32l7jn5e25r3gaca6km8fbk1kseobhs7fleli8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbrsjsofgsco502nibl63or42enmj6vt1rrk1l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjme4q4nmdb7dos9gn9selml7244beaii02cehvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4oladfo46eh668r6fname8brpv3drem20gfmdkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn0uriqng9chu4objm08574cu84qt2aqm9ct6ugg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm9cl4bcem2t9hot4evas9tlbahfqn1v31g6vea0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu104o8483ljlovvirlmk9cn7bklcvvigg8nupg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zib8v6g306ad6k8tgg2osj67530vbatoe11pfo00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmiie41krr8dmd43lpnaud6mdahu8vm1vdjueki8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7rc5ncmie2haj1q0g0gngf7b6uhour6vvafknso_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs3esmcim3dt5608nc5f284nt8e3n8ms5akpva00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbdl3j2s7sjpvo7d9co5tpal5fs25a9ttoa9mh90_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkt8nkaqqhbg5rrj0fvbcjpan6au1jj53fdnj6u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4c3vkg8pmch1m7m780ki2517205on2e824fdqe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zocsk5hsm64eq8744t8ib112mu16a99snksk8390_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs8u7d1k9s9kknigp2lqmtiq53878gpuulqubeoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z350gjggk98r5ejj0f6pjkmclr16ssjg8ntif1s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf7h6ilcr447fl42tq0bp5oacpfklqbqieclgrkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0shjmapj6cth2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The butt of Jimmy Fallon’s joke
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’ve spent years challenging the hollow narratives pushed by the media and political insiders.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Swbxlf6VgQvnK_CEVR0Q)Jimmy Fallon mocked me on late-night TV.
He joked about my support for President Trump and the America First agenda.
To liberal talk show hosts, standing up for American values is comedy.
But I'm not here for their laughs.
[This is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I make no bones about it: ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Pkau-LvRmYmgaWcxA)[I'm running for Governor of Ohio to be a close partner to President Trump at the state level!](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-zEQ)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)I've spent years challenging the hollow narratives pushed by the media and political insiders.
[Now, I'm bringing that fight home to Ohio.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
_Take a peek at my plan: _

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our "See You at the Library Day" in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our"See You at the Library Day" in the next 48 hours?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)** If you haven't heard about the "See You at the Library Day" on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it's so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte 's Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist." They've stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder's name from a prestigious book award because of her "problematic" _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for "Drag Queen Story Hours" where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for "families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for..."

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros' Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you've noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating "the environment" to a type of religion. The "Teen Zone" is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here's what's really alarming. We can't just sit back and say, "Well, I'll just make sure my family doesn't go to "Drag Queen Story Hour" and we won't check out those inappropriate books." That may be good for your family - for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980's family sitcom "Growing Pains" or from my work in inspirational movies like "Fireproof" and "Left Behind." I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what's far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote "As You Grow" to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn't like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that's original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to "confuse and demoralize children," our supporters were described as "bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about," and on and on. I can't even print most things these radicals said because it's so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang "God Bless America," and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here's the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that's how our nationwide "See You at the Library Day" was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. **I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...** ...for a very simple mission - to reject the Left's radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America's libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand "See You at the Library Day" to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you! It's going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library - that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That's why I hope you'll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a "Story Hour Kit" to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who's organizing a "See You at the Library Day" event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don't have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who've taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)** That's enough to sponsor one entire "Story Hour Kit" yourself. Singlehandedly, you'll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it's $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mbR6dByleJAm64asY6JU6g~~/AARclBA~/MQy37PIA101J1zaM5otG4HMJA6otaoXq8-J3fGvDj5zyOBk4h-AeIwlvwFRDRGzKoX1M1lAJLJOqb476-8gpzEIJpdAO5e4QzAUt1Row7ywLcXm6wvUstzykR8vz2lKonDBDBPBuVIyAT8WU0RD0qA61KvNxUSYLmRYiwAJwtEOJ99pTcv6wkHtJR8kbKLJWlT8hwk14LKynxT4gmd7SciF6AGYQS_2wLkITGOH3o3XWebHQ4qsXVytd43swBw_o0HVgHUQ93YwyGYy7ngJJM4jwNXgmKVTF3FSgs1VZ6T4~)**

body:

---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade** ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade** ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)**_ Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade** ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Uwm00LSaH0OYRis2FsZstQ~~/AARclBA~/eniXTFhPh8DiA2rg2JxDdJOdpNCL-c12B-xJDXTrXQ_moUcSrje0AxTCa6jFpY7M8FxxTRVj1JtFgiAk4f-ZLdusdnrahSUtMCy97bbkMTsaqvsaCFC1PjDah_YP_JCkPE_g1SOVe_yHe8N9ktmIj8mbi-6jBGztlaxrK7CdWxAcYfrCNPSmj0IgmSjDHgyCakZMsw1ovgoji77WM_JY4mkqM6a1SJhWBFbSRXp1zn8~)

body:
The Texas Tech women's softball team is [headed to the Women's College World Series](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DOyyMweCCYht32XZLi_CeYyRsIngbktv_cq7wdyON5tPM_LutNx9TPB9__YGO3lteT2w1IRGWleg_5RZarZTLUY98gv_4E8IqhdRcaC71Cj6mz6o6cHcB89ChG4yygxF2nrvdhckaY62CELZJWiutHQG0DnAPAjboortgQks9DGIYp36UasZRzkYbMygfmBIIkXLpaUfCt69b-uQXlj7ko0tuJ3pWNv5hcmFyaa315z3A1i6byeXaw-RSn7nQJb4EThh2vsVSieMLC2_5wLPykFPCB_KWSwJesUS8MqNVVs2SyaUrDp4tphTrZJgSj8PH9C1Cv7vv5eRPAAAA___i_YXV) for the first time in program history after taking down Florida State in the semifinal round.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1966, [Melvin B. Tolson](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO4yAUgOHT4M4WYAhxQbGNu2y7pfVsnmO0mBfBS0huP5q5wlzg_6Xv3225QUwx3__CiZ7fOy0ZW03IjGVhfjK1rdXKVM56Ug7wgRy2RUtte2l7bZcAMX0W0wW_yjCpDr1y5qqcvE5Td3hlJlDjihj2zewA1sEoL27EzYA0a-ii_45Jq61SUo2XYdRmwlFPzjqnDGzCSAyRqQx8IOMb6p4-9MIybHR2yR_MjyrGP0LPQs-ttYHrAZRTzDhQuQs9H5DDSvRf6Bkzl4hV6JkpVcr9iekVc78iPDOVZ-2KD48WU4r14oSR9xNi-lnx74BeXn8FAAD__8IffU0) received the annual poetry award of the American Academy of Arts and Letters. Tolson was a professor of English and speech at Wiley College in Marshall for 23 years. Ever dream of owning a vintage luxury estate? Well, Emma Stone has [just listed hers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S3CAQhU-DMqagBwYpIHCibJ06VLVEa0WZny3oHc3c3iVfYePu76v33p-P5QNjiuXzN2by_NrrUujsiZipLczfXM_t7J1ryz3XEvCNJWwLKLBSWQl2CRjTezFD8KsKkx7Ia2dG7dQ4TcPhzboas1ua1K6dJbvbEQFWWDE458ZxiP6SKQtWa6Xvj9sdzER3mJx1ThvchFEUItd244OYXtj39K5Paret5iH5g_mri_svAbOA-TzPWyNM1_9Ws4D5KiRg3ijR2iK_5XWW1BmZBMyUM8rOtZDE_rdLeEgrc0wp1iL32uTeqB_pwkp9IlOQ-N05FnnUfAmG5sPXeQH94YRRnxlj-p-Nf7bo08O_AAAA__8lV42H), located in Austin, for a mere $26.5 million. Read more in _Et Cetera._ Today's sponsor is [Kalshi](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK3DAQRp9G7rxIsmXZhYrAst2fKpB0ZlYarcWvi5Fmb28fHPYN0g3nwHD4fn-tXxBiyLefkNDQy5c147NFJMK6Et2pPO2zNSo1tVSygzdkZ1fJpeq56qVaHYT4XsfOmSt3i-jQCD3OQvN5WbrN6FlJ7b1QOCl_XWb0mms1TbMfQXJYumCOZ1xJJQQXw3Qa5LjgIBettBYjWDZydIFKPdGGhC9oPr7LA-vJltRFsxHtjQ0_mLwwefmG2LZwKCYvCeo3UjvwK18BoRGTl3yF_jix5t6W7LFittjbDdIeSm5b2Jmc7pTWVu7VIhvOO1TKWNuHJ3ThnthwBu9DDED4ERbSDuGW2XD-RPa__nTVuP0ZYgxt0mzktwQh_oun_5v8YeTfAAAA__8m25nP), which is now offering a legal way to trade on sports, politics, and entertainment. ## Age Verification Bill Hangs in The Balance
Apple CEO Tim Cook reportedly [personally stepped in to lobby](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZD2yGxiWgOASsr30QtS2G8a6xka4d2b5-9PsL1xSSUmvSu_P5_JJSVLeftPOk36vZcn8qsKqfC6qX1pe4VWrlnOve8mRLsoxLGixB9sD9kukJNfSNXHyNo6u4ckN3Ycb7Mc4No-po9a1vAbLbvVEnb27gS23PQ5hDZGaNL1htsfeOeva-63FbuQWx6EfBtdRMJ3lmLScN32w8jfVVa7y5PMWyt7I9FA9qml_GZwNzvk6StV3ZXB-kw3O9h3YGpz9V02ZazU403EIV9C0QyjlLwQS4Qg_A7CVJ2wnb0DeF1XQAlK8v4A2SrkqlCwpM4RHkgiVVtYLfBIxODfnFI9XEkn1PpjObjsl-fmq_2f4OeG_AAAA__8ti5Hi) Gov. Abbott against signing legislation that would require Apple to verify the ages of those who use its App Store. Apple, Google, and other App Store [operators would be responsible](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOozAYBOCnMV2Q_dsGXLi4KEJXJFdcii2Rg3-ItQYj_CeEt18lr7D9pxnNfF26iwsxzOM_N6Gl15C6GbcckQjXjuhBaeu3nCmtU57S7N3uZt93wEEfuD6A7rwLce9U4e2NeyMKtKJWjah5Y0xxt0Y0AzQDSpDIZaVdo283pYXijdLoZBHsO4xr0EJwIatSgjIowdS6roVyPVMcfaC0lnRHwpfLQ9zTE9eyT1MR7Z1oyUz-YdAyaHu3BEqx_MByTE8G7THEeE7p-7EwaP-G95q9dHl5MdmecbxizkyeGvOfQfW2TJ6uR1DAi9X6ZQsxhlzVTPFxciF-aul3Zz0t_AQAAP__-KB86w) for implementing the requirement, according to Texas Senate Bill 2420. The bill [passed both chambers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2SpCAUPg1mdAEN0gQEnZjNhruhhfBUahEseDOMt99yrzDx9__9-Zg_XEwxb7_cARa_1zJn6C0BItQZ8RNL9701LPVoR8nBXS4HPwsmFGWKCjUHF9M1yyHYhQXDB7BcyxfX7GXMsFvJ5agXWJVXyo_85YNe5GoUcMNMCH6I9jZjSijOGX-Oj6eQBp7CaKU1l84TySBELPWBOyB8u7amq3xBffhyDMnuiGcjzzcRExFT7_1xtHxjREyQ6WcjYrpHETEh-D2XVLaLiMmdZwIaG90jYswbXZz_S2OmuAPtrtI7g8aMUDMgdRvQzd3EW1vp-82n4zdXQ7Xh7DGl2EZNJNsOF9P_avizQ7-s-BcAAP__G8CL-w) with a veto-proof majority, but the regular session is set to adjourn on June 2, giving Abbott the possibility to put a stop to the bill's progression with a late veto. Gov. Abbott has until May 27 to sign or veto the bill; if he takes no action, it becomes law. A veto would give the legislature until June 2 to override it with a two-thirds majority in both chambers.
## Texas Tech Softball Reaches WCWS
The Texas Tech women's softball team is [headed to the Women's College World Series](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DOyyMweCCYht32XZLi_CeYyRsIngbktv_cq7wdyON5tPM_LutNx9TPB9__YGO3lteT2w1IRGWleg_5RZarZTLUY98gv_4E8IqhdRcaC71Cj6mz6o6cHcB89ChG4yygxF2nrvdhckaY62CELZJWiutHQG0DnAPAjboortgQks9DGIYp36UasZRzkYbMygfmBIIkXLpaUfCt69b-uQXlj7ko0tuJ3pWNv5hcmFyaa315z3A1i6byeXaw-RSn7nQJb4EThh2vsVSieMLC2_5wLPykFPCB_KWSwJesUS8MqNVVs2SyaUrDp4tphTrZJgSj8PH9C1Cv7vv5eRPAAAA___i_YXV) for the first time in program history after taking down Florida State in the semifinal round. NiJaree Canady led the Red Raiders to victory, pitching two consecutive complete games in less than 24 hours and shutting out the Seminoles across 13 consecutive innings. The Red Raiders' offense [did just enough](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAYAJ8Gd7HgMwS7oLgG6YpceyXi57ODhE1kvg3J26-yr7D1SDPS_L-5m88lH9s_v6Oh11rdgb0VJMLTEX1R7bG3RvXc216P5N_-SNEBB3Xh6gLKJZ_L28khmcDTIgY0QstZaD4vy3A3QQQdMSwrTgLlGgJAWCQkvupJzGEesvnIuAIlBBfTdZxALjjBopXWQvrIJMeUqZ4j3ZHw5dta3vWJ5xjrPhRzJ3o0Nv1hYBnY3vuI7XF8IAMbaym44aXVlYIvhYEN9dViPZGBdQzs5nf8mxhYyYXWUk1qOE169FxKblfNJN92n8tPjH636GngOwAA__9AvnqD) in concert with Canady's gems, winning the first contest 3-0, and the second 2-1. The Women’s College World Series begins Thursday, where Texas Tech will face the victor of Ole Miss-Arkansas, which continues Saturday night. [You can find a preview of the matchup here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUgOGnwW7M4SCjFBS3sZvbbmmOgiMJgpGzw_j2m9lX2PpPvuL_ekwPCjGk53_aveX3mqfka4me2Z8T8zfnutRSOJ972XNydFFyy4SA-gb6hnpyFOI1dY2zMzgjG29l3w2yh8GYZrPozXxXg0GcFShczaAHUE6BHGAmNzfBfjDQqKUEqe6tws54habXfS87WkQH3gXOZ8ubZ_-mssYrv_zZLnlvot2YjyLUP4GjwLHW2qaF6BMFjstG-xFyKls4isCx5JVnilHg6GRzWnfUEGMo91508NwpxF-V__biZfEnAAD__yeZcyc), with a bracket featuring the final contenders.
## Memorial Day Storms
Much of Texas will face [a Memorial Day cold front](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OrCAUxp8GOw0cQcaC4jZ2c9stDQPHkQTBwNlxfPuNk32Drb9fvn9f9_luQwzp-d9uaOi95DnhUSMSYZmJvikf7qiVctnqlpO3p03ezcBBtVy1oGZvQzxn2Xjz4H4UDRqh5U1ofhvHZjWDExyVVqPwIJ3Qjx4G-VCaCz64xbommMuMK1BCcNEPXQ9yxB5GrbQW0jomOfpAuXS0IuHb1iWe-YWlc3lrolmJ9sr6fwwmBtNxHN12VptsopxCviAG07XqUtHSioXBZAsFF5HB5HL07VJyona1IbafiPaXbIH3ElQP3b7uTTF-P0KMoQ6aSf7cbIifFvS3714GfgIAAP__caSEEg), with forecasts calling for temperature drops up to 20 degrees and severe weather. The slow-moving system will shift only slightly, with multiple rounds of rain and thunderstorms spreading into Texas and the Southeast by Memorial Day. Widespread rainfall of 2–5 inches [could trigger flash flooding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAURE9jd1iAsbELim3SZdstrW_ziZHARPAT4tuvsjnCljMazWjez3W5gg_-uH1DREMvl5YDawlIhHkhelCqWy2FUo4lpsPCCYfdFsnlwPjA5LBY8OFcVGvNyu0sWjRCq0loPs1zuxsJMLtxgFW4dQI7cyXR6knJCXGcVt168y7jgxyE4KIfu16qGXs560FroWBrFEfrKeWOdiR8QXHhTE_M3ZZiG8xOdC9N_9XISyMvtdbOpVdFoP0TeZsfxd7fGnmJGFP2EJiFk7mUcYNC7FFYBn8wF1KybTb2Xn0Ivoy6UfwWwYe_QfofpqeRvwEAAP__dh9_IQ) from northeastern Texas to Tennessee. Ping-pong ball-sized [hail and wind gusts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGStCAUhE-DGRagiAYEf2I2f7qh9QaeI7UoU_B2GG-_5e4RNumku77q7o_bcoMQw_H4Dztaeq9pObCWiESYF6IvStXVUijlvezp8HDC4d2ihNJcaK704iHEc-kbb-_CT7JBK00_SiPGaWo262Q3AAx6lEM39ePqnPFOezM6MGb0ogn2ggmttJRCdkPbqX7CTk1GGyN7cKwX6AOl3NKGhG8oazzTC3Pr0t5EuxE9C-v-MTUzNdda289K78tkar7YTM3iEtUxNa8hF-IQMROvCLRh5h5OXvCFGfnvUv5MpYR7RL7jnnKAeGWYmpts_bOGGEMZDOvFY4cQf3rQ3957WfUdAAD__xRohHE) nearing 70 mph are also possible as the system moves through the region.
| _Flying together with our sponsor_ [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK3DAQRp9G7rxIsmXZhYrAst2fKpB0ZlYarcWvi5Fmb28fHPYN0g3nwHD4fn-tXxBiyLefkNDQy5c147NFJMK6Et2pPO2zNSo1tVSygzdkZ1fJpeq56qVaHYT4XsfOmSt3i-jQCD3OQvN5WbrN6FlJ7b1QOCl_XWb0mms1TbMfQXJYumCOZ1xJJQQXw3Qa5LjgIBettBYjWDZydIFKPdGGhC9oPr7LA-vJltRFsxHtjQ0_mLwwefmG2LZwKCYvCeo3UjvwK18BoRGTl3yF_jix5t6W7LFittjbDdIeSm5b2Jmc7pTWVu7VIhvOO1TKWNuHJ3ThnthwBu9DDED4ERbSDuGW2XD-RPa__nTVuP0ZYgxt0mzktwQh_oun_5v8YeTfAAAA__8m25nP) The Knicks-Pacers series has been wildly entertaining so far – and for the first time in history, trading on the outcome of the games is **legal in Texas** , thanks to Kalshi. This is possible because Kalshi is different from sportsbooks, operating like the stock market instead of using a traditional “house” model. Rather than using complicated odds, [Kalshi](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK3DAQRp9G7rxIsmXZhYrAst2fKpB0ZlYarcWvi5Fmb28fHPYN0g3nwHD4fn-tXxBiyLefkNDQy5c147NFJMK6Et2pPO2zNSo1tVSygzdkZ1fJpeq56qVaHYT4XsfOmSt3i-jQCD3OQvN5WbrN6FlJ7b1QOCl_XWb0mms1TbMfQXJYumCOZ1xJJQQXw3Qa5LjgIBettBYjWDZydIFKPdGGhC9oPr7LA-vJltRFsxHtjQ0_mLwwefmG2LZwKCYvCeo3UjvwK18BoRGTl3yF_jix5t6W7LFittjbDdIeSm5b2Jmc7pTWVu7VIhvOO1TKWNuHJ3ThnthwBu9DDED4ERbSDuGW2XD-RPa__nTVuP0ZYgxt0mzktwQh_oun_5v8YeTfAAAA__8m25nP) markets show a simple percentage. For example, the Knicks have [about a 50% chance of winning the series](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK3DAQRp9G7rxIsmXZhYrAst2fKpB0ZlYarcWvi5Fmb28fHPYN0g3nwHD4fn-tXxBiyLefkNDQy5c147NFJMK6Et2pPO2zNSo1tVSygzdkZ1fJpeq56qVaHYT4XsfOmSt3i-jQCD3OQvN5WbrN6FlJ7b1QOCl_XWb0mms1TbMfQXJYumCOZ1xJJQQXw3Qa5LjgIBettBYjWDZydIFKPdGGhC9oPr7LA-vJltRFsxHtjQ0_mLwwefmG2LZwKCYvCeo3UjvwK18BoRGTl3yF_jix5t6W7LFittjbDdIeSm5b2Jmc7pTWVu7VIhvOO1TKWNuHJ3ThnthwBu9DDED4ERbSDuGW2XD-RPa__nTVuP0ZYgxt0mzktwQh_oun_5v8YeTfAAAA__8m25nP), which means a $100 trade would pay out $200 if it happens. Alongside simpler odds, there are other unique benefits to Kalshi, [such as better pricing and the ability to cash out any time at fair market value.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK3DAQRp9G7rxIsmXZhYrAst2fKpB0ZlYarcWvi5Fmb28fHPYN0g3nwHD4fn-tXxBiyLefkNDQy5c147NFJMK6Et2pPO2zNSo1tVSygzdkZ1fJpeq56qVaHYT4XsfOmSt3i-jQCD3OQvN5WbrN6FlJ7b1QOCl_XWb0mms1TbMfQXJYumCOZ1xJJQQXw3Qa5LjgIBettBYjWDZydIFKPdGGhC9oPr7LA-vJltRFsxHtjQ0_mLwwefmG2LZwKCYvCeo3UjvwK18BoRGTl3yF_jix5t6W7LFittjbDdIeSm5b2Jmc7pTWVu7VIhvOO1TKWNuHJ3ThnthwBu9DDED4ERbSDuGW2XD-RPa__nTVuP0ZYgxt0mzktwQh_oun_5v8YeTfAAAA__8m25nP)

name: Peggy
subject: How we are different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I know that it’s easy to feel alone and isolated
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf662299-ff43-42c8-89f0-3dc2c0fc225a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, In politics, it can feel like the circus comes to town in the last few weeks of a campaign – just to vanish right after Election Day. Candidates show up, give a speech, and then take off. I am doing things differently. I’ve been traveling the state with my team over the last week because I want to hear directly from our neighbors. These aren’t fancy fundraisers, they aren’t giant rallies – it’s just a handful of neighbors getting together. People are sharing what problems they’re facing and how they think we can improve things for Minnesotans. It’s inspiring. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2c7542e-be82-4edd-ba33-b3a04f3e4fc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Frankly, I think these conversations are the type of thing that’s missing from politics. It is so easy right now to feel alone and isolated. But the power of gathering and talking to one another is what we need to get through this moment and move into action mode. Listening to people and hearing them out — no matter what their views — and coming up with an action plan, that’s how we win. But I can’t do it alone. I’m running for Senate to be a voice for Minnesota families in Washington. The average contribution to my campaign is just $25. Some people give more, some people give less – but the end result is that we are a grassroots movement powered by ordinary people who care about each other and want to make life better for everyone. [We’re running this campaign on hope (and ACTION!), not hype. If that’s worth $10 to you, I’m humbly asking you to split a donation with Blue Amp Action today. Together we’ll leave Minnesota better than we found it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85d7f321-80e3-4ad6-8b18-4c68f977da96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe5b97d3-f4c6-4257-b2f3-ad6c15cb4458/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, friend.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Freedom,_
**Vice President JD Vance**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/awdT/?__vbtrk=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkyMDA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: ** Big Drop in Gas Prices **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
The Trump-Republican agenda is getting the job done.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9NZW1vcmlhbC1EYXktR2FzLVByaWNlc18yMDI1MDUyMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU1lbW9yaWFsLURheS1HYXMtUHJpY2VzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/Ik8Vf_hXZSKaGqWK-BEtGA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Did you see the news this week?

Gas prices, which skyrocketed during the four years Joe Biden was in office thanks to his War on American Energy, _have hit a four-year low (adjusted for inflation) as we head into Memorial Day weekend_.

It's great news for families hitting the road and a great sign of good things to come...** ****The Trump-Republican agenda is GETTING THE JOB DONE for the American people!**
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9NZW1vcmlhbC1EYXktR2FzLVByaWNlc18yMDI1MDUyMyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU1lbW9yaWFsLURheS1HYXMtUHJpY2VzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/Krp0BRBoBnDS5JdA5ArltQ)
---
We handed the radical-left Democrats a crushing defeat at the ballot box last year.

Now, we're charging forward with all we've got, to deliver on our promise to **get our great nation back on track** and **build a better future for our children and grandchildren**.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Surprising reason behind PA healthcare woes
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=14f98bafae&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[How lawsuit abuse is killing healthcare in Pennsylvania](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=958eafbaa1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Seth Higgins_
Since the end of the Covid-19 pandemic, Pennsylvania has been rocked by[ hospital closures](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a75dfa3812&e=b7b3eddce2),[ reductions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=79b177c72a&e=b7b3eddce2) in healthcare services, and a steady stream of news about hospital systems’[ shaky financial positions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=627fde1ce0&e=b7b3eddce2). The causes of this are many, but a decline in pandemic related federal funding for hospitals — coupled with inflationary pressures and labor shortages — are commonly cited factors. The seemingly endless waves of bad news cause our political debates around healthcare to take one of two forms. Either both sides of our political divide blame one another for the state of healthcare while offering few actionable solutions, or people simply resign themselves to the view that healthcare policy is a hopeless morass. However, there are two policy options at Pennsylvania’s disposal that can improve healthcare affordability and accessibility: tort reform and the elimination of lawsuit venue shopping. These policies should enjoy bipartisan appeal, but as we’ll see, it isn’t so simple. **Why It Matters.** When someone sues a doctor for medical malpractice, he can seek economic damages, such as lost wages, medical expenses, and lost earning potential; and non-economic damages, which can include difficult to quantify losses such as pain and suffering. Pennsylvania is one[ of about fifteen states](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b3400e5d8c&e=b7b3eddce2) without a limit on non-economic damages. This means one lawsuit can result in a claim massive enough to economically cripple a doctor or entire hospital system. The next ingredient in this deadly arrangement is the ability for trial lawyers to venue shop. This change occurred in 2022 when the Pennsylvania Supreme Court issued a ruling that overturned two decades of precedent. It all adds up to some of the fastest-rising medical malpractice premiums in the country. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6c5f935496&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Our school board elections are flawed and antiquated](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f45df5e34a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
The concept of nonpartisan school board elections is noble, but Pennsylvania’s system is defective.

As voters go to the polls today to cast a ballot in the primary election, it is not only possible, but quite likely, the same school board candidates will appear on both the Republican and Democratic ballot.

How is this possible in a primary election where each party is attempting to nominate a candidate to run in the November general election?

Under the guise that school board directors should be “nonpartisan,” our commonwealth created a system that is convoluted and often manipulated. This confusing practice is also one of a kind — Pennsylvania is the only state in the country that does things this way.

**Why It Matters**. While this might be an advantage for candidates, it creates mass confusion for voters. An informed voter will likely do some research about the candidates on their ballot or rely on the party sample ballot to make a final decision. However, with more people using mail-in ballots, the average voter may not understand the background or policies of the various candidates on their ballot.

Typically, in a primary, voters might assume, rightfully so, that every candidate is a member of their political party — but for school boards, this is not the case. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=32eeaf39f0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Former St. Joe’s prof homes in on student newspaper in lawsuit, says ‘Hawk’ article fueled firing](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8cac1c198a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Elizabeth Stelle: Pennsylvania needs genuine election integrity reform](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=03f53fff9b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stu Bykofsky: Nice guys often finish last in politics](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bd3129213b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Traveling in Romania in the shadow of the past](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0cabdeb782&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Pennsylvania taxes more than other states for gas, gives drivers worse roads](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ac4f17693d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: The Navy Yard — past, present, and future](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c9b674fcd6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen Eustis: Why Pennsylvania needs autism training for police](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6224163fe0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Tim O’Neal: Unleash Pennsylvania’s energy potential by fixing this tax code mistake](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ac01e2731e&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0d3234a502&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
As we were last week, we’ve spent much of this week reading the now-it-can-be-told tale of former President Joe Biden’s incapacity in office and the conspiracy among his staffers and some media people to conceal it. [Jake Tapper and Alex Thompson’s book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8d60879015&e=b7b3eddce2) on the subject is out and if you don’t want to read that, [there](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4cf2c34d1d&e=b7b3eddce2) [are](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d2a8cd91fc&e=b7b3eddce2) [reviews](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b39315d0f&e=b7b3eddce2) [and](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cfee8489e7&e=b7b3eddce2) [takes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=624c236801&e=b7b3eddce2) aplenty.

Some of these raise some serious questions, especially in light of the sad news this week that Biden has stage 4 prostate cancer, which has spread to his bones. Should we trust his people’s story on this? Many [oncologists are doubtful](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9eda51223f&e=b7b3eddce2). It seems petty, at this point, to challenge it, but it’s also a good test for the mainstream media and whether they’ve actually learned anything from the past four years.********
---

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

## BBC presenter and former executive dies aged 78 as family confirms in emotional tribute
Former BBC executive and television presenter Alan Yentob has passed away at the age of 78, his family has confirmed. Yentob began his career at the BBC as a trainee in 1968 and went on to hold a number of senior roles, including controller of BBC One and BBC Two, director of television, head of [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/9BMNqF5GRfjMilgHfgaAmicM6IPwDUdfjXxmnL6Z9sgL2LQghl0hRmERjUOdzloIFpkPrbAtLAOh4T8TPf6XFcc4W4ciXL_PhoKShqXdGsGIuvkr8rVcj0qpzGfMSb5tv3wQjya9Q_JrsTYQS0ygO2jAZ9e6alZv391an2iTLcW2qmqS55fULTSgNg0Haguu_SEaJa-lZx4niXPwnbSStrGkDOW10lSltSGaBXOUB-9PPCdrXXkc8tLO81EEbWrBKtES8ceI9eZ0TjHn4jVnms-nPDu1-KlER77Hm6DvJv24jSJLmG7jRa0Y-_wcX1tuGfYFkC3VdW0PpFRNHwnQ8JlI94oWHwK1O8KokeNoqBPwKemUlz-HQcTNwZzumPdwJdfw/gBg8pbai77EECi4uUV8xpjT37IQkvV7U/9)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s something I NEVER wanted to have to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=896ac66354a94932a8396913098d84b6&_e=97TiKIgQJ5yQoaOGiBCcdINmG8Ln2_Ltsxz8n606PwHlmw9fgQ4oNAtLSG_IdO38rLUqLDA6ySwjZge7VziX3JwxtGwJ7-lJpIq_0mmBjO87dB9hNkU3-vHZx4eD7OFdD0JVwO5KDrzADKf5JODmvX2kpAkwVuGjgp_3gyF8sREf60t9A8AEchv1ymNS7TCtlrgobVlES2s4dP4smFfiuh8buSn9jhfIp6ol64Qh6c3xcrPl_3y5NdLSGTxUnsh7C--u6RJB36BypIBiNP3aDg_-Wt5qhlMd8cbiDzkLb5M-Clv-_zdhpm89VhT-fPBpPQOKCu9SMHgZNNPn1RscsOiiIqUTcGpietZJVTGv7dK0xzCa3x8L9WVoxpmufiKA)
---
Peter,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=896ac66354a94932a8396913098d84b6&_e=97TiKIgQJ5yQoaOGiBCcdINmG8Ln2_Ltsxz8n606PwHlmw9fgQ4oNAtLSG_IdO38rLUqLDA6ySwjZge7VziX3JwxtGwJ7-lJpIq_0mmBjO87dB9hNkU3-vHZx4eD7OFdD0JVwO5KDrzADKf5JODmvX2kpAkwVuGjgp_3gyF8sREf60t9A8AEchv1ymNS7TCtlrgobVlES2s4dP4smFfiuh8buSn9jhfIp6ol64Qh6c2G5rAhDA9__Lkw44fnugOJEELa3ruOXwX4uHtQDvDad6xxs9YSI28a3O5MkbyBhLzJUo7r8bbx-0-_YDpu9Wk3h3ibeyhOzPJaFo-KUhqCoH9MWKKdaeitxalz4UK3j2i3vWq8GYH03enzVI1hYSlK)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---

clean_body: ........................ | Peter, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. - Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust -

name: Tommy Tuberville
subject: Should the Department of Education be shut down?

body:
The federal government has no business dictating what our children can and cannot learn.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cfe7173d99dd4e7aab386a48c8d06d33&_e=zxBv_FWu-8TgT4SLY6eLLT2sRRLnII01XpXFBaPt1jh5fbrXQZ8PGJYLhQIc1o0fEXegyKrQ3vYbuubYiECC5lM-4XOVgvNPtqw94Sj4_H6b_hetT0K_0-uMHvWOMHttOy-S_2wq9eY5ocQOjpHlo8LAZZ_oWJGc-zIwK7zqB3On0oUZDJDjmpm8nGcTkBJD6ju3VMgWcT0iTeHCTeW9u8IuCCR16l2kYrZavyxHZhbY2qvWvhna7xLr1sakqsOXmFHba_LhwMH24RDxjlYEynHJBROc3fF2jpWF2kVQygfx0JupAeGjOplUcZRwlVV7A04NTMBtUpR0-oeWCQPIOA%3D%3D)

Peter,

**The federal government is not the solution to improving our nation 's education system.**

Our children deserve an education system that sets them up for success. This starts and ends at the local level. Parents, students, and local administrators can work together to create viable solutions to improve our existing public schools.

_The federal government has no business dictating what our children can and cannot learn._

I stand with President Trump and DOGE as they work to eliminate government waste, including in the Department of Education.

As we work to make our government efficient again, I'm requesting your input:

[**DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP AND DOGE SHUTTING DOWN THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cfe7173d99dd4e7aab386a48c8d06d33&_e=zxBv_FWu-8TgT4SLY6eLLT2sRRLnII01XpXFBaPt1jh5fbrXQZ8PGJYLhQIc1o0fEXegyKrQ3vYbuubYiECC5lM-4XOVgvNPtqw94Sj4_H6b_hetT0K_0-uMHvWOMHttOy-S_2wq9eY5ocQOjpHlo8LAZZ_oWJGc-zIwK7zqB3On0oUZDJDjmpm8nGcTkBJD_WvNIveGpq8-kgDCVKLKCRo8nvMas_k59OkqT6L5OQ9yBvHLlNOB9__-JdN0Ftj_dbirsFquwF-n9hfeYEpMh2RTDPxvkrLEJB9y___sOVGMiGxOx-Icknytj4LCmHH-u42zc6zK6N8OfbUbqVV3ww%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=cfe7173d99dd4e7aab386a48c8d06d33&_e=zxBv_FWu-8TgT4SLY6eLLT2sRRLnII01XpXFBaPt1jh5fbrXQZ8PGJYLhQIc1o0fEXegyKrQ3vYbuubYiECC5lM-4XOVgvNPtqw94Sj4_H6b_hetT0K_0-uMHvWOMHttOy-S_2wq9eY5ocQOjpHlo8LAZZ_oWJGc-zIwK7zqB3On0oUZDJDjmpm8nGcTkBJD7r7Tr0fJhR0RjtWStpbAz0AV5yNCGIJRp_M5uqDm4J_po5SgwnE68GxteHgCA40mzTO8pCRNm_Byhux-WYRuSLXK2pxQYd9Vh7TbykF6zIdwPOxf_lAYsFkZEhWFF0s855E8dXY21Fm3hzfH4EyoAg%3D%3D)

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

name: Katy Personette
subject: In remembrance of George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yhfw4GwcAy1ZO0FpWQelFo4-2FlGyvFD-2FmbqCZ07IbqZwcjE6FwGHj69XXIcpFiXp-2BdQ-3D-3DCRBS_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYBPhlmhuBhRFGcrchN8Bm-2FpEaD-2B1t5qE-2Bq2iyt4xx5L6xd-2BJ7ViMj-2B4Q0CowzXx0hZmBPhMwuYZHyTBrmMVIn8SdO-2BD5iX3zS2zSoA-2BXLBB9By-2F8e7WrPjB3PXxkbXAkxwBBFIdwSEhCYqsmoD2v77WBv-2FzzIZ21KbPPpDJPeNCEm2e5MJSu-2FdTvXL6ynD0J7)
---
Fellow activist,
Today marks the five-year anniversary of the senseless murder of George Floyd at the hands of a white police officer after a store clerk alleged that he made a purchase with a counterfeit $20 bill. We continue to feel sickened by this horrific event. Our hearts go out to his family, who continue to feel the pain no family should ever have to experience.

NPP’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, and I recently had the opportunity to go to George Floyd Square while in Minneapolis with colleagues from other states doing similar work. Being there was an emotional experience and one that I will never forget. When the wind picked up while we were paying our respects and alone with our thoughts, it flowed through all of the offerings laid out in memoriam. You could feel the emotion. As we walked to the Say Their Names Cemetery, it grounded me in this work. On the anniversary of the murder of George Floyd, we also remember Breonna Taylor, Philando Castile, Tamir Rice, Sandra Bland, Freddie Gray, Trayvon Martin, Eric Garner, Ahmaud Arbery, Daunte Wright, and the thousands of Black lives lost at the hands of police. The movement for Black Lives Matter continues through community, engagement, activism, and mobilization.
---
---
Far too often, we see policies being passed that aim to silence our voices and disenfranchise Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. We must continue to engage our centered communities and advocate for policy change that centers Black, Indigenous, and other people of color and brings about the change that we want to see, including policing reform, commonsense gun laws, protecting the freedom to vote, and more.

That is why our work is so important. Let us not forget: If we’re not voting, someone else is, and it’s their voice being heard.

Together,

Katy Personette
Chief Development and Grants Officer
New Pennsylvania Project
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

We’re helping build up our Democratic bench from the ground up and challenging Republicans where they hold the most power. We need your help before our fundraising deadline. | | |
