At the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, our sole focus is on building Democratic power in state legislatures across the country. **Unfortunately, the work of state Democrats is often overshadowed by all the noise and chaos coming from Washington.** [That’s why donating to power the work of our organization is so valuable. Peter, it's Congresswoman LaMonica McIver. The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first - and**** it's a** flashing red light **for our democracy. I conducted oversight at an ICE facility in my district to do my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration are more concerned with punishing anyone who dares to speak up than transparency or oversight. **These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious.** We must stand together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. House Democrats stand ready to fight back against Trump's overreach and protect our democracy. [**Peter, we need your help. Can you split a donation between me and Defend Our Courts so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy? Your support will go towards helping flip the House blue and dismantling Trump 's dangerous trifecta. We are calling for 23,213 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to show Republicans we're not intimidated.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquVf_rZQC1UluMlnL09Kq2BVB0oFkfkmLpjXQBYj1gj-rQBlmJyOa0zx5VipXy9QYzQHGfEMPRyzuOX6frvhuTnN8CV3NFwDovq44VCr7gCUyR7ugDtdOe-zIxhPoqnMAf_FEW4v8o5kx2ArtgGBnm1HsMmKc67IYonrY6CfP8ZH_H_BG3nb2UiR6oLtCJIrUdak1WgVhlZu0yhEsXXog70pZ3avCpuuroP2MUt4z-ZNBavwx7xo4NFeIvOsf86nkOi5hx3-bsDAG8RvmGA7k9-n9YvLpin3oecP4PYVMW0J53L4kFBSR5cGSdqmH-VmeG0F8yv0-cCYuUi9v0hzMC3HQAbVjqP5aNIG8Adl_EVmuI7uQdsFnvvC58TDN9-V6fPH7XwUlG2EA3qQdBJYvF2/4gs/d30hJ2mlQcCTOuxU93xCAg/h2/h001.SxxNpJnRofrlt_wkXfiKB-kQUtIdCje6w3Fs_qfWRw0)

clean_body: It’s clear: Trump and his administration are more concerned with punishing anyone who dares to speak up than transparency or oversight. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. | | | Peter, it's Congresswoman LaMonica McIver. The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first - and** it's a flashing red light for our democracy. I conducted oversight at an ICE facility in my district to do my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration are more concerned with punishing anyone who dares to speak up than transparency or oversight. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. House Democrats stand ready to fight back against Trump's overreach and protect our democracy. This is far bigger than just me - the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. ** We're in this together, LaMonica | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you help me double the SEAL population?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
With a gift of just $2, you could help us double the population of Navy SEALs in the U.S. Senate. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFFJa7LkStWBfab_nY7gkuoHB5--O21KdaXmbqw3CeT34EEkGsM0hP_OfU0p61X2WLvZNPI__rl_iZguOObFCLgvxA3Yy-l075HTlCZ2BwbOVCTg4G0JiZz0YTdxif3Mn5BaQWGExyPnXavDw51vwXdTiPuo-nhPonE8yTyxzZd_M)

---

Fellow Conservative,

I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - _**a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community.**_

Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? **The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFJhp7LjN4dz1CYwQmxOzm2zQ0xQmXl4Pyea4TF7jQ4-_hLcRDxE1o0oMHaVUq6selrcFRd44rs940sHk6Md6FeQuTJMY1i07MEbCzz0Esn8vgmwUOm3A8m9wSQnHzHquTrRSQkF3LN_uPPK-6lHyUdcPTzmGjEgSx9JugusDZX0s)

But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. **Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party.**

President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. **There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again.**

_**President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.**_****

That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. **[I’m asking you for $2 today to help me double the number of Navy SEALs in the Senate](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFONH_YLQJecAjlEJMfbKn8je5znbW0TfrzmgLMfCOxCWpd3IiOlq_i5keduOAH7N7j79LUwGPrbJETp6xbyUm8hK9chsxm2Xs9i7Wd-ef1ry1RFRQRQTAuR0-b8C_wh4gu7-K_OvdjxycpBDiXDZrgjC7y3zVd5G_R44qiHWz5Vo)**.

Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFFpaFnrTwIe_eeIO9X2PkgqOcNJZQUm1J_x77dHp1Umf_aQMeIgEiysPjz3VvVmt9wDj-8-IV0Y5zVce9RtL980UzFRBMLRSP-MfbsmiZT4t2DIlAkr7CxWx7YuTN6DTrlWjR43oYDNPpUnvHjhYPS4vvctKg71sgfewB3jXLFsf)
I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, _**I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself.**_ As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe.

No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities.

**I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods.** As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFIq5NFNoAXsl-32XLvnn3zlggE0ZcmOMGtuGAEQg7TnnAAM_t8sTkIDf_DUhIz2UAMGrKy6X5CH2KHa5gWuZx3BVkVO7p-tlolL-dnLF_7CHNsM_Efuqr47OkdpDdhZPbWMAFyYgDQTzU568AZKXf37lkjA-1TANDF4JUvQG5qQC)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFGrONU53aEOEKdi5povweteIvyc6MRlff1eb7_jMsB_NkduHO-7hr0k8xSZUgQMuMqV3zy01gUVMrdV9lUrWZgu8iRWftp56sfjjvgBKjhldlFRR5aFhcJiyI-i_gckfOYQrUyAkRJ7V6JJ1udUjmitiXDDxTNXeCabKayGfvu_5)
I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to:
* **Back the blue** to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure.
* **Cut taxes** so your family can keep more of what you earn.
* **Protect our schools** from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them.
* **Defend our freedoms** , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFAk00zzHavo_xqmm7CCJx_4ydS0unn0B0qzQd5UOOUxUgMzbUlk1VbSbulrsdPVj4cTxUYu11OCtMWv1MO4NBq0lBfeEXuwM5JBwWzjK2_bjGAI8VoSqNHBLBSfZeBDiICtgp4xq6Hwr26jpIYZpHF7ItnXV4W9ZcLSl3moFDj2g)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFGSFQyKtFQziARPrSDFrJsvk1aOiH1ESeyJ6dfp9q96FiulX-pbF7eYV_7uhoQ1pPqqtMdKGgma5WIYVvCxd0vSrk55hh_ZqBOVDam2HBzq4ihUwr1BswuBPO-Hed5qVaOGaD821N4B5aN0KSUuziE1g0w7xwVeJ8z4051iNI-bb)
I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families.

This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why**[I’m asking you, in your capacity as a parent or grandparent, who knows what it means to protect what matters most, to chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ee53d88189846049011a5bd8b36291c&_e=eWtPZMUirMSaycZ6SSAUEkW-WogXJ3-9L-ZI53VMp-dP3sdZFDlDnRCEMY04xen5lAPq3yQCI6my4-H8qwLbOJNtKOKzCKtiubLX6UZVNxyiliClSTXoz3gqygpyNEvPe7szoPW2Qt9mLik6r4vvaiY3PI2uwheGhieyGioEHwOHe3hER3ke_sGihvm8lki0xGSz58pagIg3hnXmj7t9WuXhhBgRWtPKLDDGkP2ttfPM5kOnhgvT49FYkXjEatL9YKYaEiVgpgchD-5vZT4vFAm2LIggNMftXWJffguCH3OpZQ6nbxy-1tZCHOIDvrcvuHH8ff16OcY96lfVKfH-DBlvdboqMY_cGbe4ajrgFihhmNFg9xSy6Rxb_Qun_fh6S26zhZD69X0lMI_2is24qv2syq5dNMJ7Fh1X3z-Ss1nS81Dj8T2YYSzZ3bhLkW-a)**

Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family.

I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive.

clean_body: With a gift of just $2, you could help us double the population of Navy SEALs in the U.S. Senate. | Fellow Conservative, I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community. Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me. But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party. President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again. President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.** That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. . Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem. I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe. No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities. I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods. As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves. I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to: Back the blue to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure. Cut taxes so your family can keep more of what you earn. Protect our schools from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them. Defend our freedoms , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear. I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families. This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family. I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive. With respect and gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota P.S. In 2008 , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values! FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

subject: We don’t suffer from scarcity. We suffer from greed.

body:
18,300,000. That’s how many kids could lose access to free school meals across the country under the GOP’s budget.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1650%2E791427%2EyMl--1)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250525-1-180&t=2&akid=1650%2E791427%2EyMl--1)
**18,300,000.** That’s how many kids could lose access to free school meals across the country under Trump and the GOP’s newest budget.
**$863,000,000,000.** That’s the combined net worth of three of the men in the picture below; Mark Zuckerberg, Elon Musk, and Jeff Bezos. Yes you read that right. $863 billion. Almost a trillion dollars.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250525-1-180&t=3&akid=1650%2E791427%2EyMl--1)
This picture — a picture of the wealthiest men in the world standing behind Donald Trump as he is sworn in to serve our country in the Oval Office — says so much about who Trump and the GOP care about.
They are happy to kick millions of Medicaid, or to reduce food assistance for struggling families, or to cut Social Security benefits for seniors, if it means they can lower their own tax bills and hoard even more money. **_It doesn’t have to be this way.**_
You see, Friend, we don’t suffer from scarcity in America. We have the means and the resources to make sure everybody has food, housing, healthcare, education, safe and clean communities, and more.
What we suffer from is greed. And I am committed to fighting the greed of these billionaire oligarchs until we create an economy and democracy that works for **everyone** and not just the wealthy few. We don’t have to let people like Trump and Elon Musk decide whether or not our nation takes care of its most vulnerable.
**[If you’re with me, make a contribution today and power our movement — a movement that fights for the working class and stands up to the out-of-control greed of the billionaires in the Republican party.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250525-1-180&t=4&akid=1650%2E791427%2EyMl--1)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A reminder about Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Tomorrow, it’s not “Happy Memorial Day.” It’s about remembrance.
#

Peter, I hope you’re enjoying Memorial Day weekend. Before tomorrow, I wanted to write to you and reinforce something.
On Veterans Day in November, we celebrate the generations of people who served in the military but no longer wear the uniform.
Earlier this month, we celebrated Armed Forces Day. That’s a day to honor the people who are serving right now, the ones currently in uniform.
And on Memorial Day, we honor the men and women who never came home. Tomorrow, it’s not “Happy Memorial Day.” It’s about remembrance.
I’ll be remembering the friends I lost in Iraq. And I’ll be thinking about the guys who took their lives after we came home, too.
Enjoy the day off, enjoy the time with family and friends, enjoy the warm weather — but remember to take a moment and consider the ones who died for our country, our Constitution, and our people.
Thanks for keeping this in mind.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250525-1-160&t=1&akid=3875%2E734936%2Evx1ZWA)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Wes Moore
subject: What the reality is
body:
I have to ask you.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=92%2E1086043%2Eng-lYv)
Hi Peter, I have a quick question:
**[Will you chip in to support our re-elect campaign right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250525-1?refcode=em-20250525-1&refcode2=92_1086043_ng-lYv&akid=92%2E1086043%2Eng-lYv)**
I know that’s direct — but let me explain why your grassroots support is so important.
We’re dedicated to building a Maryland where we leave no one behind. That means making historic investments in our public schools, developing smart responses for a future without gun violence, and creating jobs and cutting taxes so working people can thrive.
I’m working hard every single day to deliver on that mission. **I’m not exaggerating either, Peter — I’ve got a calendar on my desk that reminds me just how many days I have left in office to make progress for Marylanders. And I’m not wasting a single one.**
The reality is, while we’re hard at work in Annapolis, our potential opponents have an advantage. **We can only fundraise 75% of the year versus their 100%.** That disadvantage means we’ve got ground to make up, right away.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford today? It will directly help us stay in this fight for the progress Maryland needs.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250525-1?refcode=em-20250525-1&refcode2=92_1086043_ng-lYv&akid=92%2E1086043%2Eng-lYv)**

Thank you for being a key supporter of our movement, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Final weekend to support the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
These heroes are counting on you| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uWm2vnSlMQ8QlTWjw6-nVLQz-N69Qs3qNoAq0FXoSGabH-sCOVcfBd17vQW70UxqsG3zLbSFbFCi30aGpZkKnB3UIwGLImBhD_GYN8Tun9f5i3-f5xGShBt9ECTdhm0bxmLA0rThvOSq6dI-81wGGco)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uWQQ1ysP4kKr7mMnr7M-fBC1LO7MTBWpZvBRBR6InoottGHUgqzScL12I-sBzJRTFBgySiyxa-HqvHBRN_b8iKeITVKpl3wC8pYe80YIM6Zf3n2SkS7DavvEZ6Tkqv7uqMF2_golNMroSLa2QxN7ygf)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uVtGQgVJmbjIQSHs55gEF0UELOUujUr9CG5TR5Q35wyFZS82qqn2z1RTAdgKo3ZZOBLnV-lcM4K2bo9i6LXbOgcFR9BhnZM1pzFXsET1kogYnutQlbdsgLxyrF8DOrrlk98cjgiOw-R0EGKoWaT6thY)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uVMYFR08tmToItzY5py8PO-PeNOkJKFE0o7ck3y6Yna_jtuBiJG9faohKtn-O1QpjkxZ1S4sxbCDiGNr2g2lin-BSSfzGnBF2kYUW2RmAbxdWbOGZ1wZELa1ghCFUhWAxGb1hJwUEjipSVzZA9KT3nP)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q45myPzfa9gpplwD5M4wQqzmDqBntWAG8HZ1tCWAOdWHnti95D0ps-ciI0rAekeLwaBDnCAk60CnVmFNxB7K9MejqDFwC-Tm0ZfWAYv6o7pqK5kqMjFXKMqyoQxg-h7EqfbFXB_ozBA1CACYa3Ije32TplXa8SqXxYOUYZI_zdc503GZCKFuoL1imQLbPbShnnqA7tHpqqRSiohU6KK5jrlRIn9T4AQzcpQf5yDUSsDxo%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uW8t9WxRSXb7Wfh8Z3R6zYp7yca0oBzNKMXt-MZX6V4goTroFe1GzvAlheplnm685U47NiiaUgvqZS48wD_W0eS2_cpF2fbPhhuATep7Y69Cm_xcy_KFlxz1Bus-671HTtvsdjdAuIY-aAo1YXa-cd2) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uWvfkaiCW1hjKBHOid2M4DSutNoojXTWyKNbDktQ1dNzVSbAl81gkciJtxok7_jAjlQlEN_HdNIi1AyElOFISjwD1iEw7340hgF7I9c0n-WeEGC5TEVU8PDpYw_sHkqfd3ZaOB_U_oFa6Ufgus3OevF)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f3d389326c541a9881e78d5efece47d&_e=ytgxo9tbN8e8hzdBv9_WP3hKPph2326E1mDakmEc263KEZM7lD403HDf4ea-74Q46bf4p2sEgfZ9uC7xazlnl_VChANbVDdHDP5_zsha4EUvHXuVHsLQWIlVjOf7hmPvHczYdLoodlyFb5rQJPjjPf563hctVnxaFsYZcsIA2uUHAnpAsrWWh2SwDHDU0nRoLk-XejpRev8-J09w6OQNhDpC4PIa_G1a4imSXoC8vnim3bJ-8OkhKwXDFPPUFO4OagZlQ1p-QzMcvqzraZ6yg9u1yssCTO-MPhhKtZ2dym-USFKHOiCPjxL6MglyH9X2)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

clean_body: These heroes are counting on you| | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Team Tina Newsletter

body:
|
#
---
| | Hi Peter, Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter — here’s what I’ve been up to this month! I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks!
— TK
---
* * *
**Governor Kotek takes action on summer learning.**_Image courtesy of KVAL_
The Governor signed groundbreaking legislation to secure long-term funding for summer learning programs. This will boost academic outcomes, support mental health and well-being, and close achievement gaps in our state.
* * *
**Oregon gets recognized for its energy efficiency!**
Oregon ranked in the top ten of the American Council for an Energy-Efficient Economy's 2025 scorecard, noting our energy-focused incentives that will help us reach our climate and clean energy goals.
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108345891/547625803/-209541425?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY0MDkyMC03YjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NK3Oqacawk9ZMk-4dtHiMCJL1gPpOzPnlWisWwohkkU=&emci=f154ba3d-5437-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85f40920-7b39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Governor Kotek declared May 5 as Missing or Murdered Indigenous Persons Awareness Day.**
Governor Kotek took action to recognize Indigenous people who have been taken from their families. She is committed to addressing this crisis, and we hope you all join her every May 5 in the years to come.
* * *
**Governor Kotek joined volunteers in a park cleanup for Earth Day.**
Governor Kotek, with a reflective vest and trash grabber, joined volunteers at Wallace Marine Park in an Earth Day cleanup! Our Earth needs love and care 365 days a year, so don’t wait to get involved in protecting our environment.
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108345892/547625804/881826270?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY0MDkyMC03YjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NK3Oqacawk9ZMk-4dtHiMCJL1gPpOzPnlWisWwohkkU=&emci=f154ba3d-5437-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85f40920-7b39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Thanks for tuning in to this month’s edition of Team Tina’s Newsletter. Please forward this to a friend to help us reach more Oregonians — and if someone forwarded you this message,**[_**sign up to keep receiving updates here!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108345893/547625805/2107422739?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY0MDkyMC03YjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NK3Oqacawk9ZMk-4dtHiMCJL1gPpOzPnlWisWwohkkU=&emci=f154ba3d-5437-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=85f40920-7b39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)
Thanks, team. Talk soon!
— Team Tina

subject: We're suing Donald Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Marc Elias. **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court. And now, working with the DSCC,_I'll beat him again._**

[**Before I tell you more, will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to help power the work to stop Trump's allies and take back the Senate majority? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250525-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250525-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20328%2E9716520%2ED2tpdm)

Right now, Donald Trump is attacking our longstanding values and principles. He's ignoring due process, flaunting anti-corruption laws, and, worst of all, **attacking our democracy and voting rights -- the very bedrock of American society.**

It's disgusting, but not surprising from the guy who claimed he wanted to be a dictator on his first day in office.

That's where my team and the DSCC come in -- the very moment Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten the rights of voters, we _immediately_ filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats across the nation. And we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over.** We all know that Trump and his allies will keep trying to break American democracy. We can't let them, so we need ALL Democrats -- from leaders like Barack and Michelle Obama to supporters like you -- working together.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump, take back the Senate, and defend democracy:[Please, will you donate $5 or more today to support the DSCC's work and take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250525-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250525-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=20328%2E9716520%2ED2tpdm)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: PolitiBrawl
subject: When protest tourism turns to protest Jihad
body:
The thin red line between activism and violence

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..TSK4_z0GPlbnpmdweD1Wc64LOTp4y8LJ4OWMprG6Z_Y?) for more
---
[](https://substack..HXz5Q3JoE9vi-D6lXdjdDpRvEjwDyslilZuebYjyKFI?)
---
# [When protest tourism turns to protest Jihad](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164362326&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzYyMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgxODg1MzAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDc4MDUzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.p5aveCWKKzBJnfAHdOVnOA5U8Y5hMu750enbQ4bgwT0)
### The thin red line between activism and violence
| | [Richie McGinniss](https://substack.com/@richiemcginniss)
---
| May 25| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@richiemcginniss)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164362326&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzYyMzI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODE4ODUzMCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwNzgwNTMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.22DNTJVmNW7XUohPxQQ5C0Q4O-OB6O5_T8w23GcMJQg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164362326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzYyMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgxODg1MzAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDc4MDUzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.p5aveCWKKzBJnfAHdOVnOA5U8Y5hMu750enbQ4bgwT0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164362326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzYyMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgxODg1MzAsImV4cCI6MTc1MDc4MDUzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.p5aveCWKKzBJnfAHdOVnOA5U8Y5hMu750enbQ4bgwT0)
---
| | [](https://substack..79N99hTMPY-0ST_oF79itEEPTrYS6IxjvomgA9RwYTQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/when-protest-tourism-turns-to-protest?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Elias Rodriguez has been charged with the murder of a young Israeli couple whom he allegedly shot in cold blood in the heart of DC last week. Yaron Lischinsky, an Israeli citizen, and Sarah Milgrim, an American, were both in their 20's and had plans to become engaged. Now they are dead because some guy who was born in Chicago thought he should kill innocents on one side of a conflict taking place on a different continent 6,000 miles away. Rodriguez told police as he was taken into custody, "I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Id-9BMzd72HkM1wO2xOohRphe_ueTl7ymWEeR8YpA1c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362326)
Rodriguez had been a member of the **[Party for Socialism and Liberation](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69a2f1-486c-48ee-b007-27a294bdf674?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (PSL), and was quoted in an article on the group's website back in 2017. After the shooting, the article was deleted. While the PSL **[denied that Rodriguez was a current member](https://substack.com/redirect/4913f141-bdf6-483c-bf32-b814a2cc247d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of the group, it did acknowledge that he had a "brief association" in the past. I have covered numerous protests sponsored by the PSL. The organization pulls permits for demonstrations and prints thousands of signs and pamphlets to get everyone on the same page.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bcde59ca-517a-4f91-a2ec-e2e05cab6301?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
PSL signs at a protest in front of the Capitol in DC on April 5th, 2025
I covered a PSL-sponsored Black Lives Matter protest in Philadelphia in October of 2020.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee2dd77-81da-4345-959b-acd829aa4e53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The increased police presence around the protest resulted in mass looting of shopping malls in the surrounding area.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c7ce3999-d2ab-4e6d-b03e-142a58ba5fa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Regardless of whether Rodriguez was still an active member at the time of the shooting, this killing begs the question of how and why the lines between activism and violence have been blurred to the point where Rodriguez could commit such an act with the belief that he was doing something good.
For the answer to that question, look no further than the tribalization of the American political discourse over the last nine years. When every election is presented as an existential battle and the opposing party is cast as Nazis or Communists, this is the end result. When citizens think that it is their responsibility to solve every injustice around the world via their social media posts, we get keyboard warriors taking to the streets to fight on behalf of a cause they do not understand. It's protest tourism.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/48c2739d-eb3e-450b-a28b-7ff02e3fdb77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Tired of AARP? There 's a Better Option - And It's FREE**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48c2739d-eb3e-450b-a28b-7ff02e3fdb77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **FREE membership** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
**[👉 Join the movement today and claim your free membership at](https://substack.com/redirect/48c2739d-eb3e-450b-a28b-7ff02e3fdb77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/48c2739d-eb3e-450b-a28b-7ff02e3fdb77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
At the same April 5 Palestine protest pictured above, I witnessed a white woman buy a keffiyeh for $40. I purchased the exact same keffiyeh for the purpose of protecting myself from dust storms in Lebanon for $1.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2831588-5d4d-4aa2-abd6-1ce47c86c5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Keffiyeh purchase on the streets of DC April 5, 2025
Covering protests in DC and around the country over the last decade, I have witnessed radical groupthink turn listless Americans into conduits for violence and hate.
At an anti-Netanyahu protest in front of Union Station in July of 2024, I was called a "Zionist" because I refused to pledge my allegiance to Palestine on a public American street.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Id-9BMzd72HkM1wO2xOohRphe_ueTl7ymWEeR8YpA1c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362326)
The woman in the video was vandalizing the Columbus Fountain and when I asked her politely why she was doing it she asked, "Do you support Palestine?" I replied, "I support free speech in the United States." She pressed, "do you support Palestine?" I replied again, "I lived in Jordan... and I believe America is the last hope we have." She began shouting that I was a "Zionist," which is akin to putting a fatwa on my head in this kind of a crowd. Noticing that the woman had Arabic tattoos, I responded in the language she had inked on her chest. I will admit that before I ran away, I swore at her in Arabic just to see if she understood. It turned out the woman didn't understand a word.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/042f45b2-ce8e-4084-a71d-f60b3a0bde8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In the digital age, everyone thinks their opinion matters regardless of whether they actually know anything about the subject at hand. They think that if they get a tattoo in Arabic or wear a keffiyeh then that means they are somehow righteous and exotic. It just so happens that the Arab-Israeli conflict is one of the most complex and enduring conflicts of the modern day. I studied Middle Eastern History and Arabic at one of the best programs in the country, lived in Amman, Jordan for the six months leading up to the Arab Spring, traveled to Israel, the West Bank, Lebanon, Egypt, Turkey, Morocco, and what did I learn?
I learned that the conflict was engineered by the British over a century ago, when they promised the Promised Land to both the Arabs and the Jews. I learned that America inherited this mess after the collapse of the British Empire, and has funded nation states on both sides of the conflict to the tune of billions of dollars in foreign aid per year. I learned that most of the policy makers in the U.S. have zero clue how deeply the tribal and sectarian divisions run in this region (read: our disastrously misguided invasion of Iraq), and that we have been keen to meddle in the region ever since the petrodollar became the reserve currency for the entire world. But Israel doesn't have any oil. And neither does Palestine.
I learned that it is not my place to try to undo thousands of years of warfare in a faraway land. I learned how lucky I was to call the Land of the Free home, and decided to work on making that place better instead.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Id-9BMzd72HkM1wO2xOohRphe_ueTl7ymWEeR8YpA1c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362326)
After learning these things, I decided against using my Arabic for anything beyond surprising the occasional Uber driver or swearing at angry protesters just to prove they don't speak a lick of the language that they have tattooed on their chest.
In America we are fortunate enough to have an entire ocean separating us from the irreconcilable blood feuds of the Old World. Whether the reader may support Israel or Palestine, don't bring that violence into the New World, where all of us--Jews, Arabs and the rest--are provided with the blessed opportunity for a fresh start.
We are already witnessing our American streets stained with the same blood that has been pouring into that desert since Cain slew his twin. As Americans we may think that we can fix every problem in every corner of the world, but this is a naive notion and we cannot. So protest all you want, speak out against Israel or Palestine, and vote accordingly, that's your right. But no American has the right to call for and commit violence against fellow countrymen simply because their ancestors were born in a different country or because they have different ideas.
* * *

Rodriguez told police as he was taken into custody, "I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza." Rodriguez had been a member of the (PSL), and was quoted in an article on the group's website back in 2017. After the shooting, the article was deleted. While the PSL of the group, it did acknowledge that he had a "brief association" in the past. I have covered numerous protests sponsored by the PSL. The organization pulls permits for demonstrations and prints thousands of signs and pamphlets to get everyone on the same page. | | ---|---|--- PSL signs at a protest in front of the Capitol in DC on April 5th, 2025 I covered a PSL-sponsored Black Lives Matter protest in Philadelphia in October of 2020. The increased police presence around the protest resulted in mass looting of shopping malls in the surrounding area. Regardless of whether Rodriguez was still an active member at the time of the shooting, this killing begs the question of how and why the lines between activism and violence have been blurred to the point where Rodriguez could commit such an act with the belief that he was doing something good. For the answer to that question, look no further than the tribalization of the American political discourse over the last nine years. When every election is presented as an existential battle and the opposing party is cast as Nazis or Communists, this is the end result. When citizens think that it is their responsibility to solve every injustice around the world via their social media posts, we get keyboard warriors taking to the streets to fight on behalf of a cause they do not understand. It's protest tourism. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Tired of AARP? There 's a Better Option - And It's FREE | | ---|---|--- If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch. AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a FREE membership for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached. With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including: Money-saving discounts on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials The AMAC Magazine , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more! A chance to get involved through AMAC Action , their grassroots advocacy network Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started. (Continued) At the same April 5 Palestine protest pictured above, I witnessed a white woman buy a keffiyeh for $40. I purchased the exact same keffiyeh for the purpose of protecting myself from dust storms in Lebanon for $1. | | ---|---|--- Keffiyeh purchase on the streets of DC April 5, 2025 Covering protests in DC and around the country over the last decade, I have witnessed radical groupthink turn listless Americans into conduits for violence and hate. At an anti-Netanyahu protest in front of Union Station in July of 2024, I was called a "Zionist" because I refused to pledge my allegiance to Palestine on a public American street. The woman in the video was vandalizing the Columbus Fountain and when I asked her politely why she was doing it she asked, "Do you support Palestine?" I replied, "I support free speech in the United States." She pressed, "do you support Palestine?" I replied again, "I lived in Jordan... and I believe America is the last hope we have." She began shouting that I was a "Zionist," which is akin to putting a fatwa on my head in this kind of a crowd. Noticing that the woman had Arabic tattoos, I responded in the language she had inked on her chest. I will admit that before I ran away, I swore at her in Arabic just to see if she understood. It turned out the woman didn't understand a word. In the digital age, everyone thinks their opinion matters regardless of whether they actually know anything about the subject at hand. They think that if they get a tattoo in Arabic or wear a keffiyeh then that means they are somehow righteous and exotic. It just so happens that the Arab-Israeli conflict is one of the most complex and enduring conflicts of the modern day. I studied Middle Eastern History and Arabic at one of the best programs in the country, lived in Amman, Jordan for the six months leading up to the Arab Spring, traveled to Israel, the West Bank, Lebanon, Egypt, Turkey, Morocco, and what did I learn? I learned that the conflict was engineered by the British over a century ago, when they promised the Promised Land to both the Arabs and the Jews. I learned that America inherited this mess after the collapse of the British Empire, and has funded nation states on both sides of the conflict to the tune of billions of dollars in foreign aid per year. I learned that most of the policy makers in the U.S. have zero clue how deeply the tribal and sectarian divisions run in this region (read: our disastrously misguided invasion of Iraq), and that we have been keen to meddle in the region ever since the petrodollar became the reserve currency for the entire world. But Israel doesn't have any oil. And neither does Palestine. I learned that it is not my place to try to undo thousands of years of warfare in a faraway land. I learned how lucky I was to call the Land of the Free home, and decided to work on making that place better instead. After learning these things, I decided against using my Arabic for anything beyond surprising the occasional Uber driver or swearing at angry protesters just to prove they don't speak a lick of the language that they have tattooed on their chest. In America we are fortunate enough to have an entire ocean separating us from the irreconcilable blood feuds of the Old World. Whether the reader may support Israel or Palestine, don't bring that violence into the New World, where all of us--Jews, Arabs and the rest--are provided with the blessed opportunity for a fresh start. We are already witnessing our American streets stained with the same blood that has been pouring into that desert since Cain slew his twin. As Americans we may think that we can fix every problem in every corner of the world, but this is a naive notion and we cannot. So protest all you want, speak out against Israel or Palestine, and vote accordingly, that's your right. But no American has the right to call for and commit violence against fellow countrymen simply because their ancestors were born in a different country or because they have different ideas. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I spent my 82nd birthday in jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
There weren’t any cakes or candles.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108347184/547628603/1328794144?refcode=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjY1YmEzLTdkMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nYDJv6iZAMOL3dMJ4cwkhU1l7Vx4nhm759IHPEdiNX0=&emci=beafe46b-2037-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it. Throughout my life, I’ve always found activism to be the best antidote to despair. I even spent my 82nd birthday in jail for protesting government inaction on the climate emergency _(Can you believe it? There weren’t any cakes or candles...)_ It was my fifth arrest for civil disobedience, and you know what? I wear each one like a badge of honor because I was fighting for what I believe in. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108347185/547628604/2105508926?refcode=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjY1YmEzLTdkMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nYDJv6iZAMOL3dMJ4cwkhU1l7Vx4nhm759IHPEdiNX0=) _Jane’s iconic mugshot taken in Cleveland after the Nixon Administration had her arrested in 1970._ For me, nonviolent disobedience is one of the most powerful tools we have in our arsenal; it’s why those in power are always trying to take it away from us. Engaging in nonviolent disobedience invites you to put your body — your actions — in alignment with your values and goals. Doing so calls attention to the issue, sways public opinion, mobilizes large numbers of people, and creates change. Every time I stood, spoke, or sat in defiance, it was driven by my firm belief in collective action. When people come together, particularly at critical moments, we can make history. **[And fighting this administration is our next big test. We’re the last generation who still has a chance to force meaningful change that could mean saving lives and species on a vast scale. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today. Even a donation as small as $5 or $10 can power our vital work at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108347186/547628605/2105508926?refcode=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjY1YmEzLTdkMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nYDJv6iZAMOL3dMJ4cwkhU1l7Vx4nhm759IHPEdiNX0=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108347187/547628606/2105508926?refcode=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjY1YmEzLTdkMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nYDJv6iZAMOL3dMJ4cwkhU1l7Vx4nhm759IHPEdiNX0=)

Through the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've channeled the spirit of defiance into electoral action by supporting down-ballot candidates who treat the climate crisis with the urgency it demands, but our success depends on your involvement.
So, I’m calling on you. Now is the time to act — whether it's by **[donating to support our cause](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108347188/547628607/2105508926?refcode=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.64f65ba3-7d39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZjY1YmEzLTdkMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nYDJv6iZAMOL3dMJ4cwkhU1l7Vx4nhm759IHPEdiNX0=)** , joining a climate protest, educating others about what’s at stake, or simply going out and voting for pro-climate candidates. You play a critical role in this fight.

clean_body: There weren’t any cakes or candles. | I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it. Throughout my life, I’ve always found activism to be the best antidote to despair. I even spent my 82nd birthday in jail for protesting government inaction on the climate emergency (Can you believe it? There weren’t any cakes or candles...) It was my fifth arrest for civil disobedience, and you know what? I wear each one like a badge of honor because I was fighting for what I believe in. = Jane’s iconic mugshot taken in Cleveland after the Nixon Administration had her arrested in 1970. For me, nonviolent disobedience is one of the most powerful tools we have in our arsenal; it’s why those in power are always trying to take it away from us. Engaging in nonviolent disobedience invites you to put your body — your actions — in alignment with your values and goals. Doing so calls attention to the issue, sways public opinion, mobilizes large numbers of people, and creates change. Every time I stood, spoke, or sat in defiance, it was driven by my firm belief in collective action. When people come together, particularly at critical moments, we can make history. = | = Through the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we've channeled the spirit of defiance into electoral action by supporting down-ballot candidates who treat the climate crisis with the urgency it demands, but our success depends on your involvement. So, I’m calling on you. Now is the time to act — whether it's by = , joining a climate protest, educating others about what’s at stake, or simply going out and voting for pro-climate candidates. You play a critical role in this fight. = In solidarity, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Deb Haaland
subject: my journey to sobriety
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you for hearing my story
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)
I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on our state, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. [**If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d pitch in $5 so we can keep traveling New Mexico to hear from voters and win this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_1_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2179&refcode2=2179_400544__YKh2n&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_1_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2179&refcode2=2179_400544__YKh2n&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)**
Thank you for everything.
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250525-1&t=2&refcode2=2179_400544__YKh2n&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2179%2E400544%2E_YKh2n)

name: Team Pramila
subject: All that matters to Republicans is their billionaire donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need your help to grow our progressive movement and fight back against the health insurance companies who want to preserve the status quo.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250525-5077-footer&t=1&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)
Peter, there isn’t a single congressional district in America where more than 15% of voters support big cuts to Medicaid like the ones included in Trump’s “big beautiful” tax scam:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250525-1?refcode=em20250525-5077&amount=3&refcode2=5077_420207_C1Hm_j&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)
**The truth is Republicans know that nobody wants them to cut Medicaid — they just don’t care. All that matters to them is their billionaire donors.**
In the short term, our focus must be on stopping these disastrous cuts so that millions don’t have their health care ripped away from them.
**But in the long term, we _must_ keep fighting for transformative policies like Medicare For All to guarantee every person in this country can access the care they need without going into debt.**
Peter, if you believe that health care should be a right for everyone, not just a privilege reserved for the wealthy, we need your help to grow our progressive movement and fight back against the health insurance companies who want to preserve the status quo.
[**Will you pitch in $3 today to help Pramila keep fighting to ensure _everyone_ can get the care they need?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250525-1?refcode=em20250525-5077&amount=3&refcode2=5077_420207_C1Hm_j&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250525-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250525-5077&refcode2=5077_420207_C1Hm_j&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250525-5077-footer&t=2&refcode2=5077_420207_C1Hm_j&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5077%2E420207%2EC1Hm_j)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
