name: Gary Sinise
subject: Final Weekend until the National Memorial Day Parade Starts
body:
Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitotkJxjQumH8hK7bfa0OxXf54pw9jl9OM8eg2b3yXb7Jnj5F1QOrNJy_2S0NFFN4V6hj8QiAR9PvFtNAF_v7K6hx_Fwb7pNqSwqf95s5FeAf2kYNEXrOEyKyn5JG38iZSVCy06dtUlCBMjFAiAvEZrM2)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitovi4t4ArYw4l3Me-7P4GSw40uZ-KtcTloE4d1Vs4INK9iOiZWLCL9ZlPKsIaiCrey6QW5dCuSo5oTFJEO2JCA4Raf9blvEu0Iv9z1ktxTxb3ptDBSUrA_CoD64H6Xk98hRfHqDz-sk68ekCWbRt39q8)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitotzhLVYunar1BJfcJVfYk3zDScSHzNSVbexcCoHgVXnjZQdi1ZyqXSULb4XohXbf1i6vClLy7aao_mEV-7D8TZS-zjZItFiamzy_5AVPEgBDRs2KCMCtAv5nd5YJE7RWcU8BRzuqLBrIyqdu6WCJI4o)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitosS5jRbhpkeTnqFbCPQctX4n9sjPBQZohtkhqb1XEunDHJdgx7dNHRiXfWbWjm2fKnKzI01fAG4LD9p4CZbX7pJZ2ORG7m2HgHw7fwBwnvS8wCi2chvGyQ1VO6q8a9ew-OkU6N_slucnGvkRYNnSx0S)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHE2yVaDeBtFsUbv7JAJzdal3aAJh0qjvsyVPs2YZhqHNX64iUBc7aS5NuS-d2VLpel_6PK7zCTM6hTKz230TETWmDcf-njdRW4fx-RaYBmn2LVCwqc0Pcfcy-HKD8kHrlPvLGHTNJ4RonnoOBVRnpz5VGfGH3QMBdlf-Vd5RvTChpRuHpTrmuHcfFa-w0XRjAR-YlbmtXQIBiwerC8ScVhCfoqczarQxrSqY6iJ1a6PcU%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitouVM8m5xZS2A1NjQG1JFLb4SchagR469EymLmT4mPJ8kFOGgur72-Pi7WBpz-GFpsw-Hacm-sb54-hpwLkE4sfHLb4KKRmlt9rfT-N38dBTJqGYbV0CJEx-kGukVFbsu4V1j5lNqzMqSmIAcqeYphWW) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitos5Cy5XF7HGBL8_NTujQQqqOjECfTiJIg5nlMSI4U2wUtEN22-vfM7FeY9Cr_7P82p4X8_I4GgFT15n5yJJ5fQI2Zo21lwowF-etHeYKtq4kOY25WRZe7kCHEKaNzQ3lqwSjLCVxyCGfseqMmNXX58Q)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitouTak0yQ6yhtPSMvSC-dn1iRzswfIY5k_1XG9p6_XBIDAqPxvGA9OssFT_KcEbp8pvOcVBMCYBgP8Ckz0fyZHkOGwsQ8LFc_XyesaHnMfoRJgiuEvUBMgOFQw6V6hw72YgM3sHtunUlpcmST4uwsVRn)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitouWy4FKzbz3HYkem1-7PR8BHg_j8aG6wqKY-BIA4hBHg-r36HbLbOaIdjGDZfl1AAmAnaTsbivgHk_vrKMzM3su30pGnCS_PcqqLgTSSXGaC5iRbirOB4JO4r3v5PhBroLH_XTkQETzECnQmNQOKicb)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9f99f3081a6642989afbaa051dc6b53d&_e=oA2bHyEnlV9o8ZvG86aT2xvfgaVtVAwMSJIVOUZCIfK0P41nn1u5ggJnpGncHFHEQXIGAkBw9Ql5ItI4d-Kw7xA3ccZoEcpnqErMdqKVUesPReV2mzbu-WyqCEZG9epuc0euMt3FDSCSbCf3GtxUxXVmUbEqwJisZgia3hTitou9sh1BxxfMsTEPNdZdTB8I2Oncuy_6aPnHLlpE7lYjqSZXxVJcaxKNCQXdJL2hNrki21JH30_OyO31H6nBMQ99K1gtcg_PNwxJOp2UH6e5KGC9lLtTISqH2dvxIokShnU46lz5mQ34Qmd9EnBiQJ7M)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Able Dems
subject: [SIGN]: Tell the Senate Dr. Casey Means is a dangerous pick for Surgeon General!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **Trump’s pick for Surgeon General blames our sickness on our lifestyle!**
**[Tell the Senate: REJECT Dr. Casey Means’ nomination for Surgeon General!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39NmOvaZcBPP9JnPfijpf5tHRyFqDEricGpCPweOnPDIl1F-n4uy94NKKC2zYqqB8Tv7FDLQ_8enr39g4_yyGZJwxHQ1m8TqBtnH7gdWoklqh91jgDuIByFdWDdr9hiFHJ9smZt5GDSuVGwR3HA6qbWfBVE4EFtcUbP-QzqWlYIKPZqt09TDrUHX0SGUFoV8UVwkXtFX9tOImpLjE30xwv8U7YNnvI6ywa50JEILzW5ewcBUUQ4QWk6votKxNr60W3YddM0wYpitsjqbEe4cydvJNjNelTArmUAP5PMtnsCKXroz5sSIButvhgbMSwAxgbC4qPhdkoMijoZrjEWcQZKxg8Regq88G6e4Vuc6-tkmdcb68f3DfO-fJgBNno6TTQM3PvZHMg4FQ4gEpXvKkokwU1Ow6cqVJ_trAVfZ-xq6B3Pp7GbF3iVUwguz5mQUcj5nMqHUtzo7bUw5_aoFi3WWSPYzNSLwVNtu-YTnLoEBlLGbDDEzkNtCkotQ1F9tmu2f7YOmFLCQ58J2OXqAkDA/4gs/lA-ACTnIRueqBEPgT96vVA/h0/h001.olS_OTyiq3FmhHaYicRl-f6ldxC6qSk4Xk3XsQQhsgk)**
* * *
Donald Trump has nominated an anti-vaxxer conspiracy theorist and RFK Jr. pal Casey Means for Surgeon General. She doesn’t even have a valid medical license!
Means, a wellness influencer and entrepreneur, promotes a narrative that wrongly blames individuals for their illnesses, suggesting that if we had only tried harder, lived cleaner, or made the "right" choices, we could have avoided illness and disability.
**We must reject Casey Means, an anti-vaccine advocate without a valid medical license or public health experience, as Surgeon General.**

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204ibqbvi2gajbofeun87u4959k5e7az3jux58drx1cenjhyk4h8v0ne6sto56mq6u07oj3wk56giq2sdjb&__stmp=swtr7n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdjk74h5ssiph1lu9b9e270qb6i56o3ii5ce79mggtcqrxgxrf80f82ptjx5c2k8w8agp1x8vd8khsk6ngekamabkzyxyiko78stlgqh6a0z7q5tfgqsfntqumfypxecisbzobeaq0mu8j4r52xf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdjk74h5ssiph1lu9b9e270qkfkxq41da2k7irau0go99iwv60h6lduhasah6apms5d6px13yr3m7wa14ligmikszwrwvh9o3lnogortv425ungahdu3sn3a783vgron8cr056ra9207cy7c2d1b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swtr7n&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor:

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: The right that protects all the others
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Peter, we need you with us every step of the way.
|
---

Peter, voting is our most important right as Americans — “the right that protects all the others,” as Lyndon Johnson famously said when he signed the Voting Rights Act into law.
It’s no surprise then that extreme forces have spent decades attempting to systematically undermine this right. Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to cling to power by any means necessary.
**Our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And we know what it takes to get it done: When we work together, we win. **
[**That’s why today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to All On The Line to power the movement for a fairer, stronger democracy — this work could not be more essential in the months and years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108349638/547635500/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOM_email_20250525-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOM-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250525-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOM-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyZWZlMzY1LTgxMzktZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OqxFgpTytojL_E24F9Jsaod6RkhnH356_yBmTJOKwFw=)

There’s a reason I say there is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps — the work we’re doing today is critical to advancing the fight for our democracy this year, in 2026, 2028, and beyond:
→ Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is actively involved in **court cases that could affect the makeup of up to eight congressional districts** — where we must make sure voters are fairly represented. Those outcomes could determine the majority in the House of Representatives.
→ We’re preparing to **stop efforts by extreme partisan actors to steal congressional seats** through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where leaders are expected to draw new congressional maps this year.
→ And we must stay ready to **protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it,** to ensure an accurate count and fair representation. Last time around, the Trump administration went out of its way to undermine the census. We fought back and won, and we’re prepared to do it again.

clean_body: Peter, we need you with us every step of the way. | Peter, voting is our most important right as Americans — “the right that protects all the others,” as Lyndon Johnson famously said when he signed the Voting Rights Act into law. It’s no surprise then that extreme forces have spent decades attempting to systematically undermine this right. Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to cling to power by any means necessary. Our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And we know what it takes to get it done: When we work together, we win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = There’s a reason I say there is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps — the work we’re doing today is critical to advancing the fight for our democracy this year, in 2026, 2028, and beyond: → Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is actively involved in court cases that could affect the makeup of up to eight congressional districts — where we must make sure voters are fairly represented. Those outcomes could determine the majority in the House of Representatives. → We’re preparing to stop efforts by extreme partisan actors to steal congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where leaders are expected to draw new congressional maps this year. → And we must stay ready to protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation. Last time around, the Trump administration went out of its way to undermine the census. We fought back and won, and we’re prepared to do it again. = Sincerely, Eric H. subject: Pure cruelty is cutting health care and food assistance to pay for billionaire tax cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108351497/547641499/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc3MTRlNy04NDM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Llvb0jSnQnjWEWAFuSXC6Z8KUZy14ajlAnMUOazoX0=&emci=7c7da5f6-e838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2b7714e7-8439-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)

| | Early Thursday morning, **Republicans in the House rammed through their budget reconciliation bill full of cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, clean energy investments, and so much more.** I want to make something clear: their extreme, cruel, and economically devastating bill is nothing short of a war on working families. Everything in this bill is designed to make you and your family poorer and sicker than ever before just so Donald Trump can give another round of tax cuts to himself, his rich friends, and their corporate donors. Right now, we need to lay the groundwork to push back on the Republicans' backward priorities. We need to show that their agenda is unpopular and pressure wavering representatives and senators to put _people first._ The outrage fatigue is real, but as this bill goes to the Senate, NOW is the time to get loud. Now is the time to make your elected officials know they will be held accountable for supporting this extremist right-wing wishlist. [**Join me in sending the powerful message to Republicans that Medicaid cuts are off the table to pay for their billionaire bailout.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108351498/547641501/147818231?ms=2025-05-24-budget&refcode=2025-05-24-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc3MTRlNy04NDM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Llvb0jSnQnjWEWAFuSXC6Z8KUZy14ajlAnMUOazoX0=&emci=7c7da5f6-e838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2b7714e7-8439-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364) [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108351499/547641502/147818231?ms=2025-05-24-budget&refcode=2025-05-24-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc3MTRlNy04NDM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Llvb0jSnQnjWEWAFuSXC6Z8KUZy14ajlAnMUOazoX0=&emci=7c7da5f6-e838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2b7714e7-8439-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364) At a time when our economy is slowing and families are feeling the crunch of rising costs, the _last_ thing working families can afford is cuts to their health care or food assistance. **I won't stand for it.** I won't stand for the GOP's eagerness to hurt hospitals, small businesses, and the environment – all to pay for another tax cut to billionaires. Our voices matter right now. And Republicans in Congress need to hear them. [**So join me. Stand with me in opposition to the GOP's un-American, unacceptable, unworkable billionaire bailout.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108351500/547641503/147818231?ms=2025-05-24-budget&refcode=2025-05-24-budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc3MTRlNy04NDM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Llvb0jSnQnjWEWAFuSXC6Z8KUZy14ajlAnMUOazoX0=&emci=7c7da5f6-e838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2b7714e7-8439-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364) clean_body: The latest House ratings >> | = Peter, The path to stopping Trump's extremist agenda runs right through the U.S. House — and we have a real shot at taking it back next November. = | = The Cook Political Report has rated nine Republican incumbents as toss-ups, and the GOP already has the smallest House majority that the chamber has seen in nearly 100 years — just three seats. That's why we're laser-focused on flipping these seats (we've already endorsed two pro-choice champions who can get it done!) — and supporting pro-choice incumbents to break the GOP's razor-thin majority. While the Trump administration continues its relentless assault on our rights, it's Democratic pro-choice women in Congress who are standing on the frontlines and fighting back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. **BREAKING: New Dem members slam House Republicans' proposed budget cut to SNAP as 'unconscionable'** Team – at a time when grocery prices are at an all-time-high, MAGA Republicans are trying to rip away food assistance to families, children, and working people.

Earlier this month, Agriculture Committee Republicans rammed a cruel bill to make it _harder and more expensive_ for millions of Americans to put food on the table.

New Dems like Reps. Angie Craig and Nikki Budzinski stood up and called it what it is: **a betrayal.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108353459/547646541/72061173?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250525_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM4NGNjNi04OTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Mj4zvrTUFYRAUx4AOeTCUi-UEXwbz-Gq59DSqlLsGU=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 ELECT A NEW DEM MAJORITY TO DEFEAT THE CRUEL GOP AGENDA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108353461/547646545/72061173?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250525_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM4NGNjNi04OTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Mj4zvrTUFYRAUx4AOeTCUi-UEXwbz-Gq59DSqlLsGU=)**

But there’s a reason I need to ask you, Peter.

**I don’t do a second of call time.**

Instead of spending hours on the phone begging for money, I spend my time doing exactly what I came to Congress for: _Fighting to create a better country._

But I’m only able to do that with support from dedicated grassroots supporters like you, Peter.

[With a few days until our end-of-month deadline, I really need to ask for your help: Can you give just $3 to fuel this people-powered movement? Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

But I’m only able to do that with support from dedicated grassroots supporters like you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Last Weekend to Honor These Heroes
body:
Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzAh9Io3ezZuLHE_7wMcunjTpcSEM5RTr2zjizo_Gw285wYTvOr1eiwRraRKXdYnoxRaxFwEd_pvIP39Y5T76DA6Cqy2C4CNwidqo2hF2QSuphihnDvFPF5DdHr0MGYzP1MT4ASow9kKJsKdT3KKSBht)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzBFBsc2Z0PU8ptuHmnfWZWHv83FbdY6nuw0wr2qMxGhU7BGegSLfoUahAvyYsEtC8LgC5BLHuVW3RsygOL4M3mPw2YhW4plDHVJBtwhRQETEXvI5TfmAtK7lZ8XtGZDx-F1cax6LFTaedNrvPAuz99M)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzA7I4RV5dMpb-mOw2NVpo69yJ4IXYLH0sKdCPsdEleagJpeMZJ2vugcsC5sGlGrGSPK4mWdlcd9CSOM9x9WRX2otA3Oqfzr7UynAQtHoQ9AXFgApSFzzMvXUmpdCRL1NDMVw5uA2eJhkzdp4smbPRe8)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzAI8DkCbtU2pJpu_jotPVy8MnmgBOlriwQ3na35fTsYUxB7Rtl-LHPuqIyzRjagFIf8tMNgEUHd9bCASqZwqNxOv56fgASZqzmw7t6scdhvgKcl3yzEIBXB0h3ZUnNBKm5BLq6lBILbMIzjbdE4SUHj)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xDEv6uFdtZvNETWSZLoVPSznRey8VCc9jC232oRxEFRAZmcASH34wuh79N4zEkCKe3f_KSrLA3_6AnMoTNUTN_fRfLquP5s8JrTt_DSj8DSofVyWmN5kMaZtFJPFoi68VqJyveYFK_yQjOno6TqTgEzbsoNJ28D_07pSMGR3h88JkD0WgontvNWlYH0z0lbAEjaI31hXzn0dmruXYRcvsnm2I5EJXoocRFvvF02qcAgc%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzD3BAtpnTALg7zggQw8s97TBt41uM8bxOerM3SDdRUrEW4tUWh9YPSRLF0ie8FjsdKR3rVYJKmby-HaLC_pRXPUlrmDbGAVxq1GpLf-fysF2z3cT9RqcFdhKc3CXuh03AFN4wcokF8UujIkVBwMDv0z) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzBGyu3dMGU_ucry2DyPgOyM17erh1F44rsJo5CAA8pxXUmk1Ooen2g15muybVT5n0rv_2JFV9Tid3aJUphJWbwXVAZUHAQaji4gFgrkREE9LQ-eyGLf25UaUWNn-UdFYj9a3b-uo9ygYzu7fIU2csCN)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzCk5YLoWvC_lyPlTZXJ61C3ndUI3UIeSdtRcIBmYnYtDDL7CSeu1aOOWDx3jKUiYSXYuYaB4cOWGKl3cl_YPorN5U_I7TTi5aPZjM-0uNv_LMVh33QkkBdJDSIvqb3OT5oYEuplExKJmB5iflXyiI5W)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzAmqU-nY9vsw5sUH4eP6AYpv-HAvQTBQocLn_SHdVW3gcUcHqNlydDEgslI9mpT_jN98Py6g7yVOjqiYs6kzSwxZnjhWB990QPTCPqj1KUQUndCPO-BP9I4pzBHmqFfltBDQWrcoWkHtlwLsdVDjJVY)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cadfa7952f449a28bd32e222991be5b&_e=HmTbByuqW_mOzs3IsugRDG7ABOWdy6anTvHJcNypyF9iZX7mJPTrElKcEKhh-k0xOvqneyq1VGt3YUs3bJY4Ab_R3DARc91LVNxyFgLtdc4aghXoSKcJSpAIUjKBtmpgeh_2P_UZ7qNzJfGVhSVljyVxMjddHSqkZxpPEROrYzD9iQclbyWuqSdhKYD1r6FD9va_lYZfFA6etLDH-LJcLTL3ipNeBHyUg2iszBdU2nHl4k5IUo6d6xB0Jjn3HSgIENHLfFtbjBdT3epIG0uv53g2AgeoV8ug9bistCpreC_NEhjAT512CjUPLksdnhF5)
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

name: Mark Kelly
subject: We need my friend Jon Ossoff to win re-election.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As the only incumbent Democratic Senator defending a seat in a state Trump won, he’s got a tough campaign ahead of him.
#

Back in 2022, Jon Ossoff and I first introduced a bill to ban stock trading for members of Congress and their families.
It’s incredibly popular with the American public. If you can believe it, even Donald Trump’s a fan of it. But here in Congress, there hasn’t been much urgency. Go figure.
It is one of my fundamental beliefs that no one in public service should benefit from the sensitive information they have access to. Senators and members of Congress see information every day that impacts the economy. And they should not be able to profit off of that.
It’s wrong.
With all the rampant corruption these days, Jon and I decided to reintroduce our bill. I’m encouraging our colleagues in the Senate to consider it, and to pass it.
I partnered with Jon on this because we are of the same mind on it. He’s a smart guy, he’s an ethical guy, and he’s a hard worker. Someone of character — we need a lot more people like that in the Senate, and that starts by keeping folks like Jon here.
I look forward to working with Jon on issues like this and many more in the years to come — but before that can happen, he’s got to win re-election. And as the only incumbent Democratic Senator defending a seat in a state Trump won, he’s got a tough campaign ahead of him.
The Georgia Senate race is going to be one of the most expensive and competitive in the country. And to make sure Jon keeps fighting the good fight in the Senate, we have to help him win.
[**So, If you can afford it, I’m humbly asking you to split a contribution between Jon Ossoff and me. Anything helps, and I’m only asking you to give what’s right for you. These donations add up fast when everybody’s chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win in Georgia.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250525-1-550&t=1&akid=6075%2E6688874%2Ekm3mbI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

Thanks in advance for helping my friend Jon.
Mark

name: Josh Harder
subject: A major endorsement
body:

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: This is HUGE for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Huge win for safety.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---

Derek,
I’m proud to report that Governor Kelly Ayotte has just signed two critical pieces of legislation into law that make one thing crystal clear: **New Hampshire will never become a sanctuary state**.

[](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

These new laws ban sanctuary city policies in our communities and restore law enforcement’s ability to cooperate fully with federal immigration authorities. I was honored to support these bills every step of the way and speak in favor of their passage in Concord.
Let me be clear—this isn’t about politics. It’s about **public safety** and the rule of law. We’ve taken the handcuffs off our police and given them the tools they need to work with ICE to detain and deport **criminal illegal aliens** who threaten our communities.
As I said at Governor Ayotte's bill signing today:
_“We are taking the handcuffs off of our law enforcement officers, and hopefully, they’ll be able to work with our federal government and ICE to put the handcuffs on the criminal illegal aliens that are violating and disobeying our laws.”_
These laws are a major step forward for our state, and I applaud Governor Ayotte for her strong leadership.
We are the safest state in the country, and this ensures we stay that way. [Can you help keep us on the right path with a donation today?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
Let’s keep fighting for safer communities and a stronger New Hampshire.
Democrats are going to spend millions against us in 2026. [We need to fight for New Hampshire - can I count on your support?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

clean_body: Huge win for safety. | | | | Derek, I’m proud to report that Governor Kelly Ayotte has just signed two critical pieces of legislation into law that make one thing crystal clear: New Hampshire will never become a sanctuary state. These new laws ban sanctuary city policies in our communities and restore law enforcement’s ability to cooperate fully with federal immigration authorities. I was honored to support these bills every step of the way and speak in favor of their passage in Concord. Let me be clear—this isn’t about politics. It’s about public safety and the rule of law. We’ve taken the handcuffs off our police and given them the tools they need to work with ICE to detain and deport criminal illegal aliens who threaten our communities. As I said at Governor Ayotte's bill signing today: “We are taking the handcuffs off of our law enforcement officers, and hopefully, they’ll be able to work with our federal government and ICE to put the handcuffs on the criminal illegal aliens that are violating and disobeying our laws.” These laws are a major step forward for our state, and I applaud Governor Ayotte for her strong leadership. We are the safest state in the country, and this ensures we stay that way. Let’s keep fighting for safer communities and a stronger New Hampshire. Democrats are going to spend millions against us in 2026. Rep. Joe Sweeney Chairman, Granite Solutions | | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org

**Dear Friends and Readers,**
Today I am proud to share that because of _your_ support, more than**25 million people have read our human rights newsletter,**_**Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**.**
That's 25 million readers across 50 states and 144 countries. 25 million readers who could access timely, uncompromising, human rights-centered scholarship--and who do not have to rely on for-profit corporate media. **All with no paywall!**
Due to your support:
* 🔓 _Every post is free to read._ No paywalls. Ever.
* 🤝 _We have a 99% retention rate of subscribers._ That's virtually unheard of.
* 🏆 _Let 's Address This_ currently ranks **#68** in the entire Substack politics universe--and climbing. With your continued support, I believe we will crack the **Top 10**.

Because of you, _Let 's Address This_ is one of the most widely-read political Substacks globally. To date, you've helped me write and publish more than 430 pieces on racial justice, reproductive rights, immigration, climate, disability rights, genocide in Gaza, the ongoing assault on democracy, how to fight back, and so much more.
My asks going forward:
➡️ **Stay[subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/83da159b-2898-4439-bde8-f9f4aabd0bfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and engaged.**
➡️ **Keep sharing with friends and family.**
➡️ **Upgrade to a[paid subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/83da159b-2898-4439-bde8-f9f4aabd0bfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if in your capacity.**
Subscription is a cup of coffee a month. It keeps _Let 's Address This_ accessible, without a paywall, and grows our dynamic community of 132,000+ activists. You can also gift a subscription to your family and loved ones.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..p9HaX-W1SC5fvlzIKc-Ps_GYAndzkXWK-RvWOLccc7g?&gift=true)
I cherish your trust. And I'm honored to build this platform with you. And 25 million reads in, you can bet we are just getting started. Let's keep going, because we have promises to keep, and miles to go before we sleep.
With peace and in gratitude,
**Qasim**
Founder, _Let 's Address This_
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**

name: Becca Balint
subject: Got a second?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108354767/547650921/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzUwOGYyNi04ZTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RCu9vgPXa6CamvZQUz8QxF6RJ__EzptS-C9uf2yzrj4=)
---
Peter — Sorry to bother you over the holiday weekend, but I wouldn't reach out if it wasn't important. I promise to make this quick:

My team is telling me we're behind on our fundraising. Like, _way behind_ — but it’s not difficult to see why. Things are tough right now.

Prices are still too high. Republicans are coming for our health care and food assistance to deliver a massive tax break to billionaires. People are being kidnapped off our streets. That’s why I wish I didn’t have to ask for money in emails like these. Unfortunately, it’s a necessary part of the job.

I know you probably get a ton of emails about campaign fundraising goals, but these goals aren't arbitrary.

We set these goals to help us organize, fight back, support progressive candidates, and more. And that's _never_ been more important as billionaires consolidate more power in our elections and Donald Trump attacks the Constitution and due process.

Anything you can chip in today will help me fight against this administration, defend working families, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters.

**[So here’s the part where I ask: Can you make a donation of any amount today? clean_body: | = Peter — Sorry to bother you over the holiday weekend, but I wouldn't reach out if it wasn't important. I promise to make this quick: My team is telling me we're behind on our fundraising. Like, way behind — but it’s not difficult to see why. Things are tough right now. Prices are still too high. Republicans are coming for our health care and food assistance to deliver a massive tax break to billionaires. People are being kidnapped off our streets. That’s why I wish I didn’t have to ask for money in emails like these. Unfortunately, it’s a necessary part of the job. I know you probably get a ton of emails about campaign fundraising goals, but these goals aren't arbitrary. We set these goals to help us organize, fight back, support progressive candidates, and more. And that's never been more important as billionaires consolidate more power in our elections and Donald Trump attacks the Constitution and due process. Anything you can chip in today will help me fight against this administration, defend working families, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I hope you enjoy some well-deserved rest with friends and family over the long weekend. Thanks for everything — now log off! — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

Folks, Republicans are threatening deep Medicaid cuts — and if they succeed, rural hospitals across New Mexico could be forced to close their doors. In some counties, these are the only hospitals for miles — lifelines for families, veterans, and seniors. **We can’t let this happen. ** We need leaders in the Senate like Martin who will protect our communities, not gut the care they depend on to appease billionaires and special interests. Martin is fighting back against this administration AND supporting Democratic leaders who aren’t afraid to do the same. body:

---

---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=bce718ddacd54ec0a2a35962273d054d&_e=Ei2GajsjCdoDfzHFWKNCcr8h54ESYiKr0HxXR24S3cXmkrLRoz-zdMxieek2pKpiAGqizNlMyt5wtdz-57xx-xpjKjKhFMb5ekkgTrivs-44fyrMGKphUpP2z3_XHIS-7qih5jCaS5SQfT4Q9X95s376mhoqYn_n90q9-ZWkhzBYrLwxYzQnJPfzAkz2eDm2-yC9nsaD-j1CJ20yH-U_ok2NuyUQtfGbg7vNVU9sXc6-9BDjeJnfmU-1mm2ZrlmqsO-_9KNYeYfnl9iiB3n962Xn28uNUc5xup64ScKrUhltkJB2BepxS2ZuD43zU2QTIXTmM-1k6yYWJtZhZZJCtIevs2iREoBZPbxqoATZJu2-sP41HzwD61PAVZb-Z8p2IiE3_zBfsx-a-pRmT-LPujR-neodJ3qgDTCTOT2Oc18%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=bce718ddacd54ec0a2a35962273d054d&_e=Ei2GajsjCdoDfzHFWKNCcr8h54ESYiKr0HxXR24S3cXmkrLRoz-zdMxieek2pKpiAGqizNlMyt5wtdz-57xx-xpjKjKhFMb5ekkgTrivs-44fyrMGKphUpP2z3_XHIS-7qih5jCaS5SQfT4Q9X95s376mhoqYn_n90q9-ZWkhzBYrLwxYzQnJPfzAkz2eDm2-yC9nsaD-j1CJ20yH-U_ok2NuyUQtfGbg7vNVU9sXc6-9BDjeJnfmU-1mm2ZrlmqsO-_9KNYeYfnl9iiB3n96z6qnJL5wm1WBgyaS_HR21irbfw42PXA4d5ESAHE9z6N7b9cIZyPoQKcJ8iXKL2VhfqiS6LPnQDL6btHAgRHx7UnR7AFy3qJNpiGeA84p50LXS73Vvyug_mJOY5dLT5Saln4B2gML3AxfYEOgFAqYkU%3D)
---
My friend, Sacramento is failing our kids. This isn’t new; it’s part of a pattern that started with Prop. 57, pushed by Kamala Harris when she was AG, which downgraded crimes like these, putting our kids at risk. The Democrats who did this should be ashamed! And what does Gavin Newsom have to say? Just weak posturing—he cares more about his new podcast than he does about the people of California or reining in the radicals in his party. When I’m Governor, this kind of sick extremism will not stand. I will work tirelessly to ensure our children are protected, not exploited--and that California becomes a place where every child can thrive. ${Recipient.First_Name}, I’m asking for your help to make this vision a reality. I can’t do this for you I can only do this with you. Your contribution shows the left that you will not stand for this. It will power our mission to knock on **1 MILLION** doors before the primary, fund hard-hitting ads, and help me reach Californians who want real change. Please donate $25 or $50 to help us lead the primary and fight for California.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=bce718ddacd54ec0a2a35962273d054d&_e=Ei2GajsjCdoDfzHFWKNCcr8h54ESYiKr0HxXR24S3cXmkrLRoz-zdMxieek2pKpiAGqizNlMyt5wtdz-57xx-xpjKjKhFMb5ekkgTrivs-44fyrMGKphUpP2z3_XHIS-7qih5jCaS5SQfT4Q9X95s376mhoqYn_n90q9-ZWkhzBYrLwxYzQnJPfzAkz2eDm2-yC9nsaD-j1CJ20yH-U_ok2NuyUQtfGbg7vNVU9sXc6-9BDjeJnfmU-1mm2ZrlmqsO-_9KNYeYfnl9iiB3n96zayrm0h4lDTOGN0Rn45X2P1paYEZjb0QHq_0hQe35wkx3-IgjCvak7bOM_mnqAzfZc9kM26roAgABn1WVLzcfHFJ8NPR2VDWX_GNZVgKvxcLcp5VCBfFEfDm1PHvLT0htrVRwZu1FkME51noIAarFc%3D)
---

# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=bce718ddacd54ec0a2a35962273d054d&_e=Ei2GajsjCdoDfzHFWKNCcr8h54ESYiKr0HxXR24S3cXmkrLRoz-zdMxieek2pKpiAGqizNlMyt5wtdz-57xx-xpjKjKhFMb5ekkgTrivs-44fyrMGKphUpP2z3_XHIS-7qih5jCaS5SQfT4Q9X95s376mhoqYn_n90q9-ZWkhzBYrLwxYzQnJPfzAkz2eDm2-yC9nsaD-j1CJ20yH-U_ok2NuyUQtfGbg7vNVU9sXc6-9BDjeJnfmU-1mm2ZrlmqsO-_9KNYeYfnl9iiB3n966lt54-I1NNJeEWmm63vDiqyMdiXnIlkBvhLOGd54-yXLJ3Bi8kMR9fPyBn55VU0vLGt7fXmlpIi4rG3bQJZm-YY0zlCYw7uRyKT9oWHs27WlPpGOzknLgIguGRbP1Tw_CejmVVPGd_Ct2YaJuecX8w%3D)

clean_body: When I’m Governor, this kind of sick extremism will not stand.| | | | | | | Headlines like this made me run for Governor: My friend, Sacramento is failing our kids. This isn’t new; it’s part of a pattern that started with Prop. 57, pushed by Kamala Harris when she was AG, which downgraded crimes like these, putting our kids at risk. The Democrats who did this should be ashamed! And what does Gavin Newsom have to say? Just weak posturing—he cares more about his new podcast than he does about the people of California or reining in the radicals in his party. When I’m Governor, this kind of sick extremism will not stand. I will work tirelessly to ensure our children are protected, not exploited--and that California becomes a place where every child can thrive. ${Recipient.FirstName}, I’m asking for your help to make this vision a reality. I can’t do this for you I can only do this with you. Your contribution shows the left that you will not stand for this. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: This is HUGE for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Huge win for safety.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---

Derek,
I’m proud to report that Governor Kelly Ayotte has just signed two critical pieces of legislation into law that make one thing crystal clear: **New Hampshire will never become a sanctuary state**.

[](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

These new laws ban sanctuary city policies in our communities and restore law enforcement’s ability to cooperate fully with federal immigration authorities. I was honored to support these bills every step of the way and speak in favor of their passage in Concord.
Let me be clear—this isn’t about politics. It’s about **public safety** and the rule of law. We’ve taken the handcuffs off our police and given them the tools they need to work with ICE to detain and deport **criminal illegal aliens** who threaten our communities.
As I said at Governor Ayotte's bill signing today:
_“We are taking the handcuffs off of our law enforcement officers, and hopefully, they’ll be able to work with our federal government and ICE to put the handcuffs on the criminal illegal aliens that are violating and disobeying our laws.”_
These laws are a major step forward for our state, and I applaud Governor Ayotte for her strong leadership.
We are the safest state in the country, and this ensures we stay that way. [Can you help keep us on the right path with a donation today?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
Let’s keep fighting for safer communities and a stronger New Hampshire.
Democrats are going to spend millions against us in 2026. [We need to fight for New Hampshire - can I count on your support?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
| | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org
https://snh.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=nc1lDUa6HYl1ls
---

name: The Squad
subject: We’re thinking big
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250525-1365-foote&t=1001&akid=1365%2E342411%2E2QZhga ]Squad Victory Fund

We’re thinking big,
Peter.

Our Squad is about more than passing a few policies or fighting back
against this administration. We’re building an enduring working-class
movement that reaches every corner of our country.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250525-movement.pYegtB&refcode=em20250525-1365&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1365%2E342411%2E2QZhga ]Graphic featuring a map of the United States with blue heart icons
marking Minneapolis, Detroit, New York City, and Boston. Congresswomen
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Ayanna Pressley
are shown emerging from the top of the map. The background is a
pink-to-purple gradient. Bold text reads: 'No matter where you are, you
belong in this movement'.

Some pundits and politicians are too quick to write off huge groups of
voters because they don’t come from the right places. Maybe their district
is uncompetitive, or their state is deep red, or they’re somewhere
considered ‘hard to reach.’

But we’re calling out that kind of thinking. Working people deserve to be
heard, represented, and fought for no matter who they are or where they
call home.

From New York City to Minneapolis, from Detroit to Boston: we’re
organizing nationwide for a better world for working people. No matter
where you are, you belong in this movement.

If we’re going to win the biggest fights, we need the broadest movement
possible. Our Squad is committed to building solidarity among
working-class communities across the country, because that’s how we’ll get
bold federal action to tackle our most pressing crises.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250525-movement.pYegtB&refcode=em20250525-1365&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1365%2E342411%2E2QZhga ]So what do you say,
Peter, can you chip in
$3 to help us reach working-class people in every corner of
the country and grow this movement?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250525-movement.pYegtB&refcode=em20250525-1365&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1365%2E342411%2E2QZhga ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1365%2E342411%2E2QZhga

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

clean_body: Building up the campaign infrastructure to flip swing districts and protect battleground seats takes a lot of planning – and a lot of time. | | | | | ---|--- Building up the campaign infrastructure to flip swing districts and protect battleground seats takes a lot of planning – and a lot of time. That’s why, every month, we set monthly fundraising goals to make sure we’re on track to do what we need to win. Meeting those goals month after month can make or break our ability to win in competitive elections, even this far from Election Day. But here’s the problem: In March and April, we fell short of our fundraising goals. We rely on small-dollar donors like yourself to power our work forward. Every dollar we receive from you helps: 👉 Recruit and run state Democrats in competitive elections in key battleground races nationwide. 👉 Defend and expand our Democratic majorities in states like Virginia, Pennsylvania, and beyond. 👉 Lay the groundwork for huge Democratic victories this fall and in the 2026 midterm elections. But this work rests on hitting our monthly fundraising goals. And we only have six days left to raise $150,000. Right now, we’re less than 40% of the way there. But with grassroots supporters like you on our side, we know we can hit this critical goal before midnight on the 31st. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you! Fellow Patriot,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=945bf6f9c88449e0b08756979852550e&_e=eqhwM20g64OatcCHCsXatqiFVAQEk7KIXfyaNi2tRfI3OGCThwSQig5gPZivmZo7mqXLOp3npuqv1c_WA2UnJCELZsCCIvm5870Z3oTVEcL3smxhNqdjSmhEnEGDyO1epH10aYJm2Zw6UOUNLDc_F6qQTMc-FgR76piGUZo7WZRX7R5bWv1FfmawXs2Ll3G88DnZzuLsYsipuf4EygZesMu7rk1wnfWntJvpAmtyyazxaVO1LARFX2Cjr9fO_iQlV5toGuvGEgmjbWw6pP4WDVMI9ME5kaJZSNqhst0AQJ_sR2AL6s43zvxNxtbUlolbOCINOX9HcWzpQWSflAGc01FziybXiEhR9Iofo4YIPWcV02f06yOrEMZVJo8Bp7XSrxic-MOCWkD4V3idX_BgTOL7lDjGHBTEdU-xbvnrxttSC21EnbJXL-ikWchU1-c9rPxnE0hvtAFQU248ea8zl_VyCOujfkrPb_eqtXTp5-9Ph2qpmIdam0JUB065R1GQ) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

name: Katie Porter (feat. Poppy Porter)
subject: We’re running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)
Hey Derek, it’s Katie.
Every week, I take my dog Poppy to work on her agility. Check out this action shot of Poppy and me working on her running >>
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250525_1_ak?refcode=em20250525-39750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39750_3422442_RN9K4D&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)
Just like Poppy needs regular lessons to keep her on track to reach her goals, this campaign relies on regular milestones to do the work we need to do to win in 2026.
For May, my team and I have set a goal of raising $100,000 over email. We’ve done it before, and I know we can do it again. **[Can you chip in today to help us get there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250525_1_ak?refcode=em20250525-39750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39750_3422442_RN9K4D&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)**
The truth is that political campaigns are expensive. If we fall short now, we’ll either have to make up lost ground throughout the campaign, or we’ll have to scale back the amount of voter contact we’re able to do.
That’s not the kind of campaign I want to run, and that’s not the kind of representative I want to be for the people of California.
And just as I’ve proudly watched Poppy improve her agility week after week, I’m grateful for the grassroots donations of Porter Supporters every month pushing us closer and closer to our goal.
**[If you can, I would so appreciate a contribution of $5 before our May deadline, so I can keep running to bring down costs for families and defend California from extremists’ attacks.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250525_1_ak?refcode=em20250525-39750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39750_3422442_RN9K4D&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)**
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250525-39750&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39750_3422442_RN9K4D&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39750&t=4&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39750)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39750&t=5&akid=39750%2E3422442%2ERN9K4D)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: May 25th Capitol Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ac108bfabd&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good morning fellow freedom fighter!

Earlier this morning, an opinion piece I penned titled "Big Government and Lobbyists Are Crushing the Dream of Home Ownership" was published by _National Review_. It is a pro private property rights piece and you can read it [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=555149718b&e=a7ab36849c).

Even though we haven't been conducting official legislative work at the Capitol, that doesn't mean I haven't been busy working to have my bills heard and passed. On Tuesday, I spoke at a [rally and press conference](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0b3a4e4485&e=a7ab36849c) in favor of passing [Senate Bill 1658](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bb51167a92&e=a7ab36849c) to save our companion animals. SB 1658 will provide law enforcement with the clear, enforceable standards they need to protect animals in critical need. SB 1658 does not penalize well-intentioned pet owners who make honest mistakes. This bill targets the most egregious perpetrators of harm against companion animals. **This bill _doesn’t_ pertain to livestock animals. The AG communities were carved out during initial stakeholder meetings. Don't let the misinformation prevail.**

Sadly, there has been a significant increase in the number of cruelty cases reported in the last two years, so this bill is desperately needed to give first responders, law enforcement and prosecutors the tools they need to protect animals and prosecute those who are committing these egregious crimes. SB 1658 will provide the bare minimum protection that our companion animals deserve.

As many of you may know, I have two rescue racing greyhounds and an Italian greyhound. In previous legislative sessions, I sponsored House Bill 2507, a bill that is known as “Matthew’s Law.” Matthew’s Law protects pets after an owner’s death. The bill was named after a constituent’s [family member who was brutally murdered in Tempe](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=498593098a&e=a7ab36849c). The bill was [signed into law by Governor Ducey](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1d158545c1&e=a7ab36849c) and it authorizes a landlord to request a tenant provide the contact information of a person authorized to retrieve and store the tenant’s property if the tenant is incapacitated.

In 2022, I sponsored House Bill 2372, another animal cruelty related bill. The bill established that an individual on bail or release for an animal cruelty offense must serve a term of probation and be charged with a new violation of the specified animal cruelty offense. Also, it prohibited the individual from possessing or having contact with any animal. This was to address a circumstance of an individual who had committed an animal cruelty offense in Maricopa County and had moved to Yavapai County and had graduated from abusing smaller mammals to horses to abuse.

Earlier this year the Maricopa County Sheriff’s office [arrested a man](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=23c6346442&e=a7ab36849c) in [Gila Bend](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=63ed6e5ebc&e=a7ab36849c) with an egregious animal cruelty case. Unfortunately, there was also one other cruelty case that took place in my own [legislative district](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=682819b37e&e=a7ab36849c) around the same timeframe.

If you love your pets, please contact your state legislators this week to encourage them to act on this important bill. First, [email](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5c5ac483e8&e=a7ab36849c) the Speaker. Then, go to the state legislature’s [website](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4a0bd7dd4a&e=a7ab36849c) to locate your two state house representatives and senator. Send all three of them an email asking them to vote out SB 1658. Together, we can save our pets.

On Wednesday afternoon, I stopped by the _[She’s All Cat](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7396995269&e=a7ab36849c)_ event because the current mayor proclaimed it “Phoenix Feline Awareness and Education Day.” Missy Pruitt has been working on such an initiative throughout the year to make Phoenix more “cat literate.” In 2021, I worked with Missy on the passage of Matthew’s Law, so it was great to return the favor.

On Friday, I taped an episode on 3TV’s “Pets on Parade” alongside the Arizona Humane Society to discuss the importance of passing SB 1658. It aired on Saturday morning, but you can watch it [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5df8065a67&e=a7ab36849c).

Tomorrow, May 26th is Memorial Day. It’s not about a day off, but a day to honor and remember those veterans by paying tribute to these national heroes we can call our own. **Freedom isn’t free.**

_Senate Republicans Media_

[https://t.co/4hsxcJsLMh](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0f20150dc9&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://x.com/azsenategop/status/1922696954997268504?s=46&t=ve4XQJ0oA2ruD3ye7jMXeQ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b436c10155&e=a7ab36849c)

_Senate Republicans Weekly Newsletter_

clean_body: | | | | | Good morning fellow freedom fighter! Earlier this morning, an opinion piece I penned titled "Big Government and Lobbyists Are Crushing the Dream of Home Ownership" was published by National Review. It is a pro private property rights piece and you can read it . Even though we haven't been conducting official legislative work at the Capitol, that doesn't mean I haven't been busy working to have my bills heard and passed. On Tuesday, I spoke at a in favor of passing to save our companion animals. SB 1658 will provide law enforcement with the clear, enforceable standards they need to protect animals in critical need. SB 1658 does not penalize well-intentioned pet owners who make honest mistakes. This bill targets the most egregious perpetrators of harm against companion animals. This bill doesn’t pertain to livestock animals. The AG communities were carved out during initial stakeholder meetings. Don't let the misinformation prevail. Sadly, there has been a significant increase in the number of cruelty cases reported in the last two years, so this bill is desperately needed to give first responders, law enforcement and prosecutors the tools they need to protect animals and prosecute those who are committing these egregious crimes. SB 1658 will provide the bare minimum protection that our companion animals deserve. As many of you may know, I have two rescue racing greyhounds and an Italian greyhound. In previous legislative sessions, I sponsored House Bill 2507, a bill that is known as “Matthew’s Law.” Matthew’s Law protects pets after an owner’s death. The bill was named after a constituent’s . The bill was and it authorizes a landlord to request a tenant provide the contact information of a person authorized to retrieve and store the tenant’s property if the tenant is incapacitated. In 2022, I sponsored House Bill 2372, another animal cruelty related bill. The bill established that an individual on bail or release for an animal cruelty offense must serve a term of probation and be charged with a new violation of the specified animal cruelty offense. Also, it prohibited the individual from possessing or having contact with any animal. This was to address a circumstance of an individual who had committed an animal cruelty offense in Maricopa County and had moved to Yavapai County and had graduated from abusing smaller mammals to horses to abuse. Earlier this year the Maricopa County Sheriff’s office in with an egregious animal cruelty case. Unfortunately, there was also one other cruelty case that took place in my own around the same timeframe. If you love your pets, please contact your state legislators this week to encourage them to act on this important bill. First, the Speaker. Then, go to the state legislature’s to locate your two state house representatives and senator. Send all three of them an email asking them to vote out SB 1658. Together, we can save our pets. On Wednesday afternoon, I stopped by the event because the current mayor proclaimed it “Phoenix Feline Awareness and Education Day.” Missy Pruitt has been working on such an initiative throughout the year to make Phoenix more “cat literate.” In 2021, I worked with Missy on the passage of Matthew’s Law, so it was great to return the favor. On Friday, I taped an episode on 3TV’s “Pets on Parade” alongside the Arizona Humane Society to discuss the importance of passing SB 1658. It aired on Saturday morning, but you can watch it . Tomorrow, May 26th is Memorial Day. It’s not about a day off, but a day to honor and remember those veterans by paying tribute to these national heroes we can call our own. Freedom isn’t free. After session my team and I, will actively work to accomplish our campaign goals for the interim, but I’d surely appreciate your help.
