name: Team Powered by People
subject: We’ve been driving all across Texas to get people talking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Amarillo, Denton, Wichita Falls, Houston, Mansfield, Garland, Dallas...

Over the
last few months, we’ve organized town halls all across Texas, bringing
thousands of people together.

At these events, we’ve seen people register to vote for the first time,
talk about how to take action, and — most importantly — start to
understand that we’re in this together and we have to fight for our
country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250525.1Drp6B&refcode=ema20250525-240127&t=1001&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0 ]If you’re ready to help Beto and Powered by People organize more town
halls, chip in $3 right now. Beto doesn’t draw a salary from
PxP, so your donation will go to things like renting event space and
literally putting gas in the tank.

At our town halls, there’s only one rule: be good to each other. We don’t
check party affiliation at the door. Whether someone voted for Trump or
Harris or didn’t vote, all are welcome.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250525.1Drp6B&refcode=ema20250525-240127&t=1002&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0 ]Beto speaking in a ballroom to a full room of people at a town hall.

No town is too small and no county is too red. Beto went to Tuscaloosa,
Alabama to join to University of Alabama students in protest when Trump
invited himself to their graduation:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250525.1Drp6B&refcode=ema20250525-240127&t=1003&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0 ]Beto speaking outdoors to students at University of Alabama

Action like this, getting neighbors talking to each other and learning
that they share the same dreams and the same concerns, is the way to beat
the isolation and hopelessness that Trump thrives on.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250525.1Drp6B&refcode=ema20250525-240127&t=1004&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0 ]Image of Beto speaking in another convention room packed with people

It is the key to victory and the antidote to despair. We want to organize
even more town halls in June and July, but hosting events that draw
thousands of people costs money.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250525.1Drp6B&refcode=ema20250525-240127&t=1005&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0 ]If you’re ready to keep Beto on the road, chip in $3
today.

Every dollar raised goes to renting space and equipment, publicizing and
setting up the events, training volunteers, and even paying for gas.

Thank you for being a part of this movement,
Team Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=240127%2E444211%2Ec4Bla0

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
Republicans are on offense — let’s go on defense and flip key seats.
This won’t be easy, but I have hope. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357242/547659528/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.25_Flip-The-Senate_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEzMjlkYy05NTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDojVibewrXffjgecVJp7UaDSOgdHvN9tIwacULGWUw=) Republicans are set to spend millions — in fact, Elon Musk already pledged $100 million — attacking our movement and everything we stand for. **But history shows when Democrats organize early, recruit strong candidates and refuse to give in to right-wing pressure — we win.**

Republicans are working hand in hand with Donald Trump to roll back rights, pack the courts and gut Social Security and Medicare. They’re propped up by MAGA extremists and billionaire donors. They’ll stop at nothing to hold their Senate majority.

To win we need to:
* **Defend our Democratic seats** – including Jon Ossoff in Georgia and Cory Booker in New Jersey.
* **Protect open blue seats** in battleground states like Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire and Illinois.
* **Flip GOP-held seats** – including Mitch McConnell’s open seat in Kentucky.

The stakes couldn't be higher. Trump and his allies are already raising millions to lay the groundwork for decades of right-wing control. If we don’t take back the Senate, they’ll continue confirming extreme judges and undoing every bit of progress we’ve made.

**We need to act now — and lead by example.** That means building a people-powered movement that’s ready to meet this moment.

[**_Can I count on you to chip in today and help elect Democrats who will fight for working people?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357245/547659531/1276597034?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.25_Flip-The-Senate_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEzMjlkYy05NTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NDojVibewrXffjgecVJp7UaDSOgdHvN9tIwacULGWUw=)

clean_body: Republicans are on offense — let’s go on defense and flip key seats. This won’t be easy, but I have hope. = Republicans are set to spend millions — in fact, Elon Musk already pledged $100 million — attacking our movement and everything we stand for. But history shows when Democrats organize early, recruit strong candidates and refuse to give in to right-wing pressure — we win. = | | = Republicans are working hand in hand with Donald Trump to roll back rights, pack the courts and gut Social Security and Medicare. They’re propped up by MAGA extremists and billionaire donors. They’ll stop at nothing to hold their Senate majority. To win we need to: Defend our Democratic seats – including Jon Ossoff in Georgia and Cory Booker in New Jersey. Protect open blue seats in battleground states like Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire and Illinois. Flip GOP-held seats – including Mitch McConnell’s open seat in Kentucky. The stakes couldn't be higher. Trump and his allies are already raising millions to lay the groundwork for decades of right-wing control. If we don’t take back the Senate, they’ll continue confirming extreme judges and undoing every bit of progress we’ve made. We need to act now — and lead by example. That means building a people-powered movement that’s ready to meet this moment. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s fight like the future depends on it — because it does. Kirsten Gillibrand = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Trump’s cuts will lead to more wildfire damage
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donald Trump is ramping up his scheme to fire scores of federal workers and gut critical agencies—and his latest target is the U.S. Forest Service.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357632/547660817/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRjZTgwYS05ODM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JimUarzSKTNZJE6dfyEiDk9mBHOfTyb8a-EIfXHiHQY=) We need you to see this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357633/547660818/1393317466?refcode=email_052525_forestservice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRjZTgwYS05ODM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JimUarzSKTNZJE6dfyEiDk9mBHOfTyb8a-EIfXHiHQY=&emci=4fc7501f-1d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=86dce80a-9839-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047) **Donald Trump is ramping up his scheme to fire scores of federal employees and gut vital agencies— _and his latest target is the U.S. Forest Service._** Trump has already cut 10% of the agency’s workforce, and is considering firing thousands more of the critical workers who manage our forests and reduce the risk of wildfires. This is unconscionable: **Trump’s mass layoffs are coming right as the summer wildfire season is just around the corner.** And at a time when climate change is accelerating the pace of wildfire damage each year, we need more dedicated staff working to prevent these deadly blazes— _not less._ **[Trump’s Forest Service cuts are putting homes, infrastructure, and even our very lives at risk. We’re calling on this grassroots team to help us raise hell and fight back: Please, sign our petition demanding Trump reverse these catastrophic cuts and reinstate the fired federal workers who keep wildfires at bay. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357634/547660819/1393317466?refcode=email_052525_forestservice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRjZTgwYS05ODM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JimUarzSKTNZJE6dfyEiDk9mBHOfTyb8a-EIfXHiHQY=&emci=4fc7501f-1d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=86dce80a-9839-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)** | | **[SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357635/547660820/1393317466?refcode=email_052525_forestservice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRjZTgwYS05ODM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JimUarzSKTNZJE6dfyEiDk9mBHOfTyb8a-EIfXHiHQY=&emci=4fc7501f-1d38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=86dce80a-9839-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They said it was impossible...
body:
-It all started in a garage with no budget and a dream. -You didn't just believe in us. You built us. -From one spark to a nationwide fire. -You helped make the impossible possible. -What started small is now shaking campuses across America. -This is what a real youth revolution looks like. -Because of you, the tide is turning. -See what you helped unleash on the campuses they said we'd never reach. -We were never supposed to be winning--and yet here we are. -One dream. One vision. A whole new generation rising. -You were there from the beginning--even if you didn't know it. -Let me show you what you helped ignite. -This fire's not going out anytime soon. -We're about to go further than we ever thought possible. -Thanks to you, we're lighting up the map. -This is the cultural shift you prayed for. -What we're building together is bigger than you think. -This isn't nostalgia--it's mission fuel. -When they said we'd fail, you said "go." -Let's make this a turning point for history.

| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/cTzP5ci4hen9g6yRwmpFDcoQpFZTm-SiJpFjrPIJq67UZS1KJInqZb_VVjFCW8pnI6VIaV9OdB2YrHLp2XwwxjCzEWRC6VNwNHKABFd0g7vmruIyJ4IOtVoQ-xn9u1fiw6DmoffY9nqbMZ3zeufCQEyjn5yLTBinPkFThwvd_q4FmMA1imsHi3uZms5A21SArnmGbVUMDZNCq-TeZ0d1iQJpAn0l4BXMpZbc0Qo_DHtyUz96aQE14FliCFuaBDtqtQmCnssjpYkPm__z-ddjB9pUUXybkJOXN1Km52yfdgapMBJRLlLxb2ooEz4LWmx1paME7FTzJWSiNCsMyFNq4CoJXnkERrVD4LtJJd9fT630EcIRu7wjSz-hubUZqNJqe_Ptc6X8jCOg5EEWlx_2ql9FeV2JiinM5xd2CRbunuN0Qk7HSXhEO-CLy7kdDRmSZewomtMwlbR9rNuxAQ/wD_34fulWhaFkCY11hn5S496TGSGMu68/9)

Peter, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ziLfohxXC37kZCuNeErF3aTJ-hKE2_1_08dAjsuf9yckbu0GoCTGDh15bznbzIm-TadOaVY5nI16sgStokQBQ1mb_u04kiEs8wjdzos5Bby9YmgLG5Mtz0TtjcXZMubq8RqPRjf0w3MC8Px6jO-ClidSOFNEpkDwZPhHFZbm5Z_MjZmTJydo8otzqlBK0XUYxVbkHW6B5NPHqMmg31PWYW_xxhTkspePeYSSn-gg51sLU-iSFDI93w1azQPbfEkZPBpt65FYhO9MylBbnEAkbgJ1pNi56xT3oAqUPayKJXLGtJY4XojflYHXo6ZiCyKmd_1dRVZbXqut12AYSP2ggCezvOdLyddnv6zcw_uO0PRRnMt5c2gTfb3Nul_A3-zo7am_IUBcq-d1FtJa5_fbdikd1us3Pc1GQJHk60eBxwwrOBqjgZeCHRLod23Ma3KsIKS-_f_A3u8n3acCJg/fI8rw5UT-MZ_AeWnaHC73RxnHEdhLQwg/9)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... **Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today.It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs._But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._**I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.**My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again.** I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...**And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --****when I told them the vision:**_" We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America."__" We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds."__" We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN."_They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out...**They believed. And Peter -- so did patriots like you.**
---
You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story.Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.**You didn 't give up. And neither did we.**But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._ I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rmP6yeK4h1M7H-yvdmRln1V2ACw_g-0URK6plbqWi96EII25ZubpaKcL46_mqb7Gqf7C7T1yC9HRvCWAe9-lIKHzaUVp8Z644wXe0alirN8s-QMTmDIsVoJO2KbXyf21BWecnmFbMSDhqeSCfF5m4vNbStqpUrFaWCB8TaeMY2vikj7RIgQ15GbWk_HVZSykT5jejXLAA91ovcEjjnVMlTZbF1s4Qcckan7Sd8-B5m_8VAEbJKU1-ivqGoDaM-exuDvhPhATOAvDm-o6-EOjCdMGx_q2OtMTenCBr6RorXKO_MphV5EHHgNtLhGNZfWS5A6ZvyzZ3Jt36CJZj2w7dF1ci_ag5ROKpeabWzzvZwvjSKfyGFFew_2tbDGl35jTIjUa4TrCyIBOMJd_4zCryWMI3HB7n75TttlHHdugDaeFtugiotpYGMEQMF-NFpOU0h7W0vstjgeIhRcj0Q/iDHKu4sURqJgvx4wCIdA_JgLqzWiRc2B/9)

**And then... something happened...** **_The students started listening._** They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._ And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. **Peter, just LOOK at the movement we 've built:** 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Peter, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." _They were LIED to._ **But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again!**

This generation is just getting started.**But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.** The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous.They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning._We cannot give them back an inch._ So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder.We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory.**We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.** Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.

The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. **And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.** That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. **I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving.** Let's keep our foot on the gas. Turning Point USA

body:
Now, it’s time to stand with her

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108357804/547661534/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJiZDdlNmEtOWEzOS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GlIt1ysM764hrhJxjdDlJMBY6FKUQqJGA0yCXd7eg2I=) Hi, did you see this note from Janelle? The stakes have never been this high. MAGA Republicans just passed their budget that will **decimate Medicaid and take away health insurance from nearly 13 million Americans.** **Janelle is fighting for each and every one of us,** ensuring that our families have a voice in DC. subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/NOIqgHNehCiOI3PliTo5AJ6lJ-lLhpmo3UNbbgYcb8KMbpjF2xTFreYcL9lr-9QFeo9fVFaCshqtx7MKGhwPMyM4lpoS02Lq_dXtPWMXuhXo7ymYYEZPt44Ns8dx04YvTVJLHB93r2hVE5uOiMWdkTjiO6sLNkch8eflQoFlw8y3QxeNTWIx2zF5/Ykn23O9fodzwvlpOFfs6mcvRU755EEEg/9)_

---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/OA_UANCabTTNcajJgujkOcCYD7HhccCGDiWQXTARmWCWU2mE3X9pUpEzKnWmw5h6vVyyY4_BiQl12J01jvQEqmwuRrz1dPU-TsUErJa9PB_EbyyAjK5VUwcKFaa_yaQOIgkP8cgD2LQuI4trSl6xy-sNrOnQospY3BEx_ysFw-agcSLDbgj0zorSKulC2Lifb9Gbknyuw_6QUKutgGIgoxUSWnfPlSycFXC7ynVQ4PtyWLucNkjYKfJDSvzTYc422sOBL0JzrqQCYDtuyunLlZzIVBbMBBBGDjsyLYwxaJieB24IUUusfwlx-gN1qfuR0TvKZ57buEjCfKnRW4Oe9TR63XUAOlEGn4VYnFOeV2n6aGVxlSYmHhLq7CbZe5QdWRUS-zgJlIAnQwEuij40QZnC1I0efa8k5v4UzVNrNYxN3B7tuMQRSOKDxCdAtsQzUQ/mraMMgAV0D6ZUZ1Y-JPLGA7a7TsSFNzU/9) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/9eVCOA7SNguNruiFz1tfQ3srZAr8rJnboYDfg_rRskO2JK95CwfQutbtPXURwkTHN0Umpez_jF38MbU25zCke1MRAO-mzboqwLDNKnDLJOVkH_WjNyLcNBJxUqU_QB9V1Ogm91E_6bVvIflQ4qze9pbwIYZvKxZ04Pxlp-h7LS6ARUlvjeONhJVJRRmyfahwW4xZo8-sYWdCo286Sld9BlYjfAgSraY385blKoUD03jIdNlKitf7-W7iqfZh-Cns32DXnU1SMT-WKSkkg9g582LfBcgXt22hGb_D8-921y5Yu5gpJKTYENLGQuNLrdTjqLbKtrcfbYLXj77Usg0XJrk1hK6CSRgHgFkaY0YQe-XLW1TomUhjSH_fbKg3coqs45h_3yIeRP67cx9p96qFk5EZ8sYsXT_CGrohbrQgTiCyPcujczbtzwkUHO6doAhGCQ/rJqbTU52SxW3XAa8yxK407pPIKSC8k_Y/9) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/zUMFWGQ45dobOCSQbtmsAoInkqAQpLhMvVg4jYZJGASN4cMK-tXXiulXecYupZ-QEZRTJkdT1siTgptMlJV-LblQvorlrsU423LJKzkDD0uILc8zHct1OMhP_oy0aZ_jppLmAkCD7MghOup8Lq2Pp2gomctWWtxTp-2WecCdrz0ONgWcfVkbYndDZvHJy1KWjwpVS41om-EAqCtQAcV-D5CnG-rclBeivpSB-L3gxQQ42zhUSMuAsycmB3xNZvSi3wR6ou90TmR_tgHK5ksLc23pjnZxZwFkVz9-v51DDkQAWB7aUckN6VbI4wAsmT57PAyvFqcmLUX_H_q1Eym-4beOIfGhkbIVeg1F6u2iQLZ4N92uFrMU1MYn92fDCPhW4H9Q0dw44Dbuw6RZGODhglTHThCZ2H3hnOtgNKihWC0xydlDKM_rkMdWdjkl4t-KWw/DRpvVwScGpdVukqxDmjdQjEP7yjMAOip/9)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you help me double the SEAL population?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend American families. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9Yt3BzzvhRfrokS4Df0BOtfbqw-ihCU5V1pUAdhnk8VI6Pd_3rT07vqufPoN7n6kEGDHdhKime4fcqyI8IsTFF2vQhtb8k_CWzIEbTBOSIsuPIaecvynVF4o0bIfoJz4sGgBdRuycRzV52BGBL9I_3WxZSn5ov326IC_foDwgauu)

---

Fellow Conservative,

I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - _**a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community.**_

Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? **The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me.**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9ScfGR8ubVdbj9Sn61RtcVmKHKRSqpjprBFVXNBd7NoaeQ1or-ERWtaIBrsiVByxipJIBhRmT0ONxqV3nOCUgyLzE8lBaft9gFkdxfuTbXlXGbV5wrzcS_BRJNP4foPKd7hkdQhjPvP18DqGPBunIy86ya_euk1c8bjQP1VJsVbO)

But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. **Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party.**

President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. **There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again.**

_**President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.**_****

That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. **[I’m asking you for $2 today to help me double the number of Navy SEALs in the Senate](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9S_oo1f-Q_RRRt5zIcjOlydQq9lyfaX0lSwwvLfmjkiU7qKZakIMCT5-EgQFX8bnc0yGqvKVhdTY147JHnXZZ6H12Guq31JadwrN3-XMBW2UK456mSAZjaPCdYnJEuootD7yxHdp-FWSNreIC0Io0QenIhu19QHAkToLXLIywek2)**.

Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9UjUrbn_ltGZvXz0yaIQHwEV90DxnTmpOay86v34mh4QryQJW3SsKXnB2etOm-njsUnIWlnIgu3_URn3_0e6IIvn-ydbKFJ-3LnF-x1qibbgfMX2mCSUWG-EdlEFUTFIrLtwG6P7sNKLxn5itsZGIMC8g0s9Cdx6gewJjbYVCtDL)
I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, _**I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself.**_ As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe.

No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities.

**I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods.** As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9QlGR4DyZsK2z6mnMrBr4dsoMnOvrurRlFJvvyt2T3aaLxq3TrMWHFV6S5cy81-FOrzclOhk_qP0cXKOahClduH2c8p89h77Fm_W7DgimLxPk4noDYQsbS6dCXfKGIwhx5iblCo9QzWuXyePpZY09LihAfspqD-zhhr2VuPGRGZR)
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9SdVho_HVErGE3ZHdiWH500fFnhU9tEOTEeKCZIzt7AmfWXjDYFJozVKtI3K4_SCB2Smq4t83iLjO7rLyJopWclRQ_HguWos-MwXwRzr8IsPZZbdfmhQ_0vWdBYmWN_iDjCU_zvIuCNsf95gsNrPEJhari8yszYbcsn47MXmf14z)
I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to:
* **Back the blue** to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure.
* **Cut taxes** so your family can keep more of what you earn.
* **Protect our schools** from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them.
* **Defend our freedoms** , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9aIhvlmcyoAFP4lQ-YCNJnAKZtbJKaN4cRxja0VVhWuESzKXUNH17XP5MIK0MCnYvVBJKiHLMyIAi2uchHglsKwewfRY796KGHmrqnlhAqbijG2fmFraUT26r5x6ugf2B8tn2rEHoKf_Few-B5asYn8_2DI_eqaE03JsCF760p7T)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9TLa6wRw9-EMvw5oFpqbeQw8hp3Sgg4NXFeh8hmrueIJbDJlH7595iXmGJlMvRLscAilwaOviof8Gr3QZLjH2SsLmx3jfFynSPnepZ_OjGiQPkNMxSlWH2b4LjkAJC_6aCoRu3UrVsePoMtqfg5nU5-Y-2RC4PFkKphSevPNo5kA)
I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families.

This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why**[I’m asking you, in your capacity as a parent or grandparent, who knows what it means to protect what matters most, to chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9X23a1NaiGeZJS1qC8OO_nsAGhx9edS0TD0Y_43vgZ5VVP-8L-4jKhmjtmb31m-27W96vO88HGx-Zyoz7XuKG7VvhROM9UfGuAIvd13Tvvuuvmo3N2JRQSLU5j4lgS2yN14Whh0_QJ6DoaEhvVpU6EkWeqizd1_Ikm-g5xyRLQ4W)**

Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family.

I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive.

With respect and gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

**P.S. In 2008** , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values!

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9aWDh18fqIDiiw2Th8X7NEMU9SzW_uMOCIjfZGIxP2I4knxo2Km8LKyNZVOUbslUp_RTeoBTKRvRnA-GT8SzYOHWbF9v-2KmoAhctSIWP3hhcx4F0Ejs-KzAsEBcnSr89YnvjEMdU2SOL0pFsLAeejpOodO1JUkJ9sJs8HK7Gv3G)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyB5-3w92I-A4uF262BgxpwmvEZvuPNfFKGGpLcxIAn9a89ydkvpXB-QSk7GYDwVizWgsj-Ty2KMuzndU8Re_eOMuIJayCCav8JBvjSOlU74L5CqFzyBVgoHvG8YuQrxwZxGr4BpsGVcDDBYBeXxlI0Z2dTyE7OhXf2Aw6Xmgxq2D2ctFdmn3aXq6pKVAafaHpdtDj6bLq97f84dPB_fyrzVz3bVjfTin3JT4s4CaLzrpzeprhw6V6gJtE2yZz4Dc9ScfGR8ubVdbj9Sn61RtcVmcM5Om815aCOZZ1oKEffTlFqNZ3L9XA--5RTlcTvVj_EMnuLY-HVDen3Gxl6XBhm176VsXH1nsg-jsZXQ3lDNLuetKnBA3y8Rj7dUZbfuoa3G1f0Ao77EhHh-PecqDO7sHgeFdtrwCxiutgUIzQpi5)

**FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyJVV6e5ZhX1V5VAP8f_ODs35yinLigHMp-BYWNx0y6YuB95v_781y4-mcNGy7mXO0DVsq_Z_8ry9hbfx5iUnkxs46MlMsLARkFTijYw3HbjGNVWwVyeiwQn0GOqV47Di3AWtYclqdeWoaSKatw00dvCkJOkPfujDUvUUwbsn-B-v1ZvkRWt2RRO0LiW05nH6f7IjqXu7lUP8INFpXXXHdNc%3D) [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyEEWFJCfUSt7R8Z4LZeILgN-EAoZdX7nBCErvP3Gb8BviJDJeUQH1hdgILN1BRVzMzcoZ0O7B5za3HylLfAxKbGcEr5-aF3sk1k1ZQ8klVU-z3pxTITkHB-ypoiswQnuMu_ksV8mHDHBtauPceGiVu_1DB6unJjfXlf2Kw3_9jhSktfCCc5QdrFFYJciuymSbQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=49ff6e49819c45918685a90963aa19d1&_e=CYYHdy-Q4XiIbnHi7xNIyKtxX_hdNLnAk2eYsyUo7XMWt_1Jz2QhhJUXd2trD068_sFebY_5gn5CtBGANiJL_Gvxdj_ZYEwF8ASiOGmE9yT6U_YjK1NmX3paC2Ma0hcQ6bThWQQ0SnFNgM_vu0yFBVtblz3q4CjFzzMooS1PzKJBTeSDOJQC1fjZl9fXqv_kyGGQFSX85f4bXZBrrUQnSYajf3upOIO0XOKR14sWB7Q%3D)

Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party. President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again. President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.** That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. . Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem. I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe. No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities. I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods. As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves. I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to: Back the blue to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure. Cut taxes so your family can keep more of what you earn. Protect our schools from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them. Defend our freedoms , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear. I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families. This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family. I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive. With respect and gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota P.S. In 2008 , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values! FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=rUY6m41WoUy7h1a2B7TroyhZqooqRkrbQ%2FkY%2BTV1XJpLJk8I638KTwmSYLLPcI%2BIW4YGazeac%2BksfIo8w6Q4%2BUxvKDUWq2RuDVPdaA9CuKwj3hRVsOqzo5Wumy4V%2Fu2hl6tQh6EYjD9pVt1%2Fo5HqBeLcAACs4FJRI%2FtpTEilBjZ%2F025lrwmL4djvO%2BY%2FzuexFHRLv2mf%2FoY2RO%2F3PnZCJO7owp4GtJTs4r2ilSfv9T3TLXqwgwaQn%2FMCOMqtBmy0G3TrcIYx%2Bh%2Bu5XmpitMCuwdV7E8kDkfpfgZUPqqucSIkhptu%2Fx0cT0uKV46xYfAV0%2BHEsJaQJZIeM%2BhuiPTjM1N0epxoygLKPZz05yPjVkeke5ihq%2FFUk81wX%2BegtG%2FtQDvYj9GiRNKkeTx7je1oSb24csmewR2hvJzgsMfpSr%2BfyAA5qyO9sx9rujcI%2B5FS)

| |
---
Peter,

On April 24th, a woman in Louisiana was deported—along with her seven-year-old daughter and four-year-old son.

Both children are U.S. citizens.

And the four-year-old boy is battling stage 4 cancer.

Last week, I questioned Secretary Kristi Noem before Congress. Under oath, she claimed to have documentation that the mother had consented to the deportation of her U.S. citizen children to Honduras. She has yet to produce a single page.

Let’s be absolutely clear:

**The family’s attorney has publicly confirmed that the mother explicitly asked ICE not to deport her children — and never gave consent for their removal.

This family was denied access to legal counsel before being deported. Their lawyer was in the same building — but ICE carried out the deportation anyway.**

During her confirmation, Secretary Noem said her focus would be on deporting individuals convicted of crimes with existing removal orders. That’s not what’s happening.

Instead, she’s deporting children with cancer. U.S. citizen children.

Rather than targeting serious threats, she’s targeting sick toddlers. Rather than upholding due process, she’s flying around the country, playing dress-up for cable news.

This cannot stand.

[We must change course—immediately—before more innocent children are harmed on Secretary Noem’s watch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108359530/547667574/2041901197?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250525_FR_KristiNoem_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjAxODM4Yy1hNjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugSibR6QlYvG-bRU578KQ3A4kAMRIJuaHysHE5TL94c=)

Thank you for standing with me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Seth

| Peter, it's Jenn — Maxwell’s finance director. The next time you’re wondering if your $20 donation makes a difference, I’m here to tell you: _**it does._** So far this year, Maxwell’s average donation is $19.76. Yes, you read that right. _Just $19.76._ That $19.76 is what allowed Maxwell to be the first Gen Z member re-elected to Congress. It’s what’s fueling our fight against the Trump administration and their billionaire buddies. It’s what’s keeping Maxwell fighting for you in Congress. | Peter, I'm reaching out today because Virginia is at a crossroads, and I need your help to make sure we take the right path forward.

I've dedicated my life to serving our country and our Commonwealth. From my days as a federal law enforcement officer to my undercover work with the CIA, I've always prioritized Americans' safety and well-being. Now, as I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm asking for your support to continue that mission.

We're facing unprecedented challenges:
* Attacks on women's fundamental rights
* Attempts to restrict voting access
* Efforts to ban books and undermine public education

These aren't just policy disagreements, they're threats to the very fabric of our democracy and the values we hold dear as Virginians. That's why I'm running for Governor—but I can't do this alone.

[_**Can you contribute any amount right now to my campaign? clean_body: Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us build a campaign that reaches every corner of Virginia with our message of progress, security, and opportunity for all. | = | Peter, I'm reaching out today because Virginia is at a crossroads, and I need your help to make sure we take the right path forward. I've dedicated my life to serving our country and our Commonwealth. From my days as a federal law enforcement officer to my undercover work with the CIA, I've always prioritized Americans' safety and well-being. Now, as I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm asking for your support to continue that mission. We're facing unprecedented challenges: Attacks on women's fundamental rights Attempts to restrict voting access Efforts to ban books and undermine public education These aren't just policy disagreements, they're threats to the very fabric of our democracy and the values we hold dear as Virginians. That's why I'm running for Governor—but I can't do this alone. = | = | = | = | = | = Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us build a campaign that reaches every corner of Virginia with our message of progress, security, and opportunity for all. body:
Here's what we know: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108360197/547670065/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE564_20250525_RTResend_ALL&sourceid=1056217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E2NWU1Mi1hYjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NuPvLmr6O7XbFB0zUTvLay6_Gl6t96XqeYim4rn_1O8=) Peter – Have you heard about the GOP's new anti-choice agenda?

In coordination with the country's most powerful anti-abortion groups, **_Republicans are taking steps to ban abortion pills and roll back Americans' fundamental freedoms._**

🚨 Just a few days ago, Sec. of Health and Human Services **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.** ordered the FDA to re-review mifepristone, an FDA-approved safe and effective medication used in nearly two-thirds of abortions nationwide. ****[**This is an inflection point, Peter. Can you donate today to help take back power and replace these anti-choice extremists with Democratic pro-choice women?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108360198/547670066/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE564_20250525_RTResend_ALL&sourceid=1056217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E2NWU1Mi1hYjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NuPvLmr6O7XbFB0zUTvLay6_Gl6t96XqeYim4rn_1O8=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108360199/547670067/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE564_20250525_RTResend_ALL&sourceid=1056217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E2NWU1Mi1hYjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NuPvLmr6O7XbFB0zUTvLay6_Gl6t96XqeYim4rn_1O8=)
---

Republicans just handed over their anti-choice agenda (they're internally calling it "Rolling Thunder"). Here's what it includes:
* Banning safe, FDA-approved abortion pills like mifepristone
* Blocking online prescriptions and mail delivery of abortion medication through telemedicine
* Shortening the window for abortion access (in states with partial bans) from 10 weeks of pregnancy to just seven — before many people know they're pregnant
* Suing doctors and manufacturers in shield-law states who prescribe pills across state lines
* Stripping federal funding from organizations like Planned Parenthood

And they're already putting this plan into motion:
* Missouri Republican U.S. Sen. **Josh Hawley** just introduced a bill requiring in-person doctor visits for abortion medication, plus added surveillance.
* In a dog-whistle move, the FDA signaled it wouldn't challenge mifepristone unless "new data" emerged — so the GOP responded by immediately releasing a new junk science "report" riddled with misinformation from a right-wing think tank.
* Now, RFK Jr. is ordering the FDA to follow through on that challenge.

Anti-abortion groups are seizing on Republican control of Congress and the chaos of another Trump term to push their extreme, unpopular agenda. But Democratic pro-choice women are standing up, fighting back, and building campaigns that WILL take back power this cycle.

****[**Donate now to support the EMILYs List-endorsed candidates fighting for abortion access nationwide:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108360200/547670068/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE564_20250525_RTResend_ALL&sourceid=1056217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E2NWU1Mi1hYjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NuPvLmr6O7XbFB0zUTvLay6_Gl6t96XqeYim4rn_1O8=)****

clean_body: Here's what we know: | = Peter – Have you heard about the GOP's new anti-choice agenda? In coordination with the country's most powerful anti-abortion groups, Republicans are taking steps to ban abortion pills and roll back Americans' fundamental freedoms. 🚨 Just a few days ago, Sec. of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ordered the FDA to re-review mifepristone, an FDA-approved safe and effective medication used in nearly two-thirds of abortions nationwide. **= | = Republicans just handed over their anti-choice agenda (they're internally calling it "Rolling Thunder"). Here's what it includes: Banning safe, FDA-approved abortion pills like mifepristone Blocking online prescriptions and mail delivery of abortion medication through telemedicine Shortening the window for abortion access (in states with partial bans) from 10 weeks of pregnancy to just seven — before many people know they're pregnant Suing doctors and manufacturers in shield-law states who prescribe pills across state lines Stripping federal funding from organizations like Planned Parenthood And they're already putting this plan into motion: Missouri Republican U.S. Sen. Josh Hawley just introduced a bill requiring in-person doctor visits for abortion medication, plus added surveillance. In a dog-whistle move, the FDA signaled it wouldn't challenge mifepristone unless "new data" emerged — so the GOP responded by immediately releasing a new junk science "report" riddled with misinformation from a right-wing think tank. Now, RFK Jr. is ordering the FDA to follow through on that challenge. Anti-abortion groups are seizing on Republican control of Congress and the chaos of another Trump term to push their extreme, unpopular agenda. But Democratic pro-choice women are standing up, fighting back, and building campaigns that WILL take back power this cycle. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
Democrats would rather imprison me than deport an illegal alien!

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/25f86fced378ebf9/?utm_campaign=20250513&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

Arizona’s Attorney General just got the green light to _DODGE_
deportations of illegal aliens:

“HOBBS VETOES GOP BILLS THAT WOULD FORCE COOPERATION WITH ICE”

[SOURCE: _AZ Mirror_]

Meanwhile, that same Attorney General in Arizona is trying to imprison
me as an _innocent_ man for 20 YEARS.

That perfectly sums up the current state of the Democrat Party...

DEMOCRATS ARE TRYING TO DESTROY AND IMPRISON PRESIDENT TRUMP’S
CLOSEST CONFIDANTES LIKE ME, ALL WHILE THEY SHIELD MS-13 GANG MEMBERS
AND ASSAULT ICE AGENTS.

And because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to
issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, the corrupt Democrat Attorney
General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that
President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.

But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the
MS-13-loving Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon,
he’s calling on YOU to join the cause to save me.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/25f86fced378ebf9/?utm_campaign=20250513&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000
before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani
Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.

I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say,
but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.

Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this
is. And now I am _HUMBLY_ echoing the President’s call to “save”
me.

_Of course, if you cannot give at this time, please do not feel any
pressure! Take care of yourself._

SO, IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY
GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND TO HELP ME RAISE THE $50,000 I NEED TO CONTINUE
FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE DEMOCRATS TRY TO JAIL ME
FOR LIFE AS AN INNOCENT MAN.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: A "must stop" kind of bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lxR4iBGWC2X0m4YA69rBWqQwbvjv8jtWEqZCWdNRnvgpMX1nWvJavqgh/alaUGgtM/x1KWm7EdYT0i6MtfdfcHqtJ4pL2peVrUgSxBHMWV4=]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=lxR4iBGWC2X0m4YA69rBWqQwbvjv8jtWEqZCWdNRnvgpMX1nWvJavqgh/alaUGgtM/x1KWm7EdYT0i6MtfdfcHqtJ4pL2peVrUgSxBHMWV4=]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”

clean_body: Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .” We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [] Voter Action Project [=] CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [=] The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks. Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. This is unacceptable, Peter. **_NCWLife_ : Schrier challenges Republican committee chair as Medicaid markup session goes 26 hours**
* * *

Peter,

For 26 grueling hours this week, Kim sat in a House committee room, fighting tooth and nail against Republican attempts to gut Medicaid and rip healthcare away from 13.7 million Americans.

When it came time to speak, Kim didn’t hold back. She looked across the aisle and asked a simple, powerful question: _**"How does kicking or shifting 13.7 million Americans off of their health insurance 'make America healthy again?'"**_

_And she’s right._

These reckless cuts would devastate families across the country—leaving millions without the care they need, closing the doors of rural hospitals, and forcing communities to go without a single urgent care center when emergencies strike, all to fund tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and satisfy Donald Trump’s latest political demands.

Trump himself called it the “ultimate betrayal” if Republicans can’t get this done immediately. But Kim knows public service isn’t about pleasing donors or campaign followers. It’s about protecting the people you represent—and that’s exactly what she’s doing. Now, Kim’s up against deep-pocketed special interests who are furious she’s standing in their way.

**[We need to show her that grassroots supporters like you have her back. clean_body: This is unacceptable, Peter. NCWLife : Schrier challenges Republican committee chair as Medicaid markup session goes 26 hours Peter, For 26 grueling hours this week, Kim sat in a House committee room, fighting tooth and nail against Republican attempts to gut Medicaid and rip healthcare away from 13.7 million Americans. When it came time to speak, Kim didn’t hold back. She looked across the aisle and asked a simple, powerful question: "How does kicking or shifting 13.7 million Americans off of their health insurance 'make America healthy again?'" And she’s right. These reckless cuts would devastate families across the country—leaving millions without the care they need, closing the doors of rural hospitals, and forcing communities to go without a single urgent care center when emergencies strike, all to fund tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and satisfy Donald Trump’s latest political demands. Trump himself called it the “ultimate betrayal” if Republicans can’t get this done immediately. But Kim knows public service isn’t about pleasing donors or campaign followers. It’s about protecting the people you represent—and that’s exactly what she’s doing. Now, Kim’s up against deep-pocketed special interests who are furious she’s standing in their way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=6&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=7&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=8&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=9&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=10&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=11&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=12&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90356?t=13&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19946%2E878179%2EY5zxug)

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—**and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.** I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. My lawyers stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [**We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Ohio House Dems so we have the resources to win this legal battle. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108360616/547671588/797825109?refcode=250525_McIver_Job&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3YWRjNS1iMTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlpEOpRCvk360pl0JEZKk0q3TX1WdwzwxDdMcYQfUgM=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108360617/547671589/-1009854833?amount=15&refcode=250525_McIver_Job&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3YWRjNS1iMTM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlpEOpRCvk360pl0JEZKk0q3TX1WdwzwxDdMcYQfUgM= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: 🚨We’re breaking up with Big Tech for good🗽💪🏻
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d39e96b14fa40779c35809a972b5c71-c1cd26cdc19c4dabbc5f0ecf626a7152/63)
---
|
---
For years, The Babylon Bee stayed afloat by relying on Big Tech ad networks such as Google to help pay the bills. But our CEO Seth announced last week that we are now shifting to being funded entirely by direct sponsors and readers like you.
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d39e96b14fa40779c35809a972b5c71-c1cd26cdc19c4dabbc5f0ecf626a7152/63)
---
_**We used to be at the mercy of Google**_ and other ad networks to decide what to show on our site. To read our articles, you’d have to scroll past banner ads for toenail fungus meds. And nobody wants to see that.

**But thanks to our paying supporters** , we’ve finally been able to break up with Big Tech and pull all outside ad networks from our site.

**We need you to help us** keep it that way: _**support _independent_ fake news journalism**_ by becoming a premium subscriber.
---
[ **SUPPORT INDEPENDENT COMEDY**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d39e96b14fa40779c35809a972b5c71-c1cd26cdc19c4dabbc5f0ecf626a7152/63)
---
Direct support from our premium subscribers is the backbone of our business, and our insurance policy for the future. The more we move towards becoming fully reader-supported, the less risk we’ll be shut down by Big Tech when we tell jokes that woke censors don’t like. You get benefits when you join, too – **[become a premium subscriber](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d39e96b14fa40779c35809a972b5c71-c1cd26cdc19c4dabbc5f0ecf626a7152/63)** to start enjoying your perks:
---
* Access to our **full-length documentary** and more exclusive video content
* Merch **discounts**
* Our latest Book: _The Babylon Bee Guide To The Apocalypse*_
* Sketch footage, bloopers, &**Q &A content** with the Bee writers
* Access to a community forum where you can **pitch joke ideas** to the writing team (who will probably ignore you or tell you you’re not funny, but you never know)

---
(And a little pro tip: Use promo code SPRING25 for 25% off and help fund your favorite comedy writers in our continued fight against Big Tech.)
---
[ **Support The Good Guys**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d39e96b14fa40779c35809a972b5c71-c1cd26cdc19c4dabbc5f0ecf626a7152/63)
---
Love,
The Babylon Bee
---
*Annual Premium Members Only
---

Jupiter, FL 33468

body:
This is going to be one of the consequential elections of 2025 – one that could decide whether MAGA extremists take control, or whether state Democrats clinch a trifecta. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| **Something BIG is happening in Virginia.
**
Democrats have launched campaigns in **_at least 90 out of 100 House districts_** – one of the most ambitious efforts this team has ever put together.

We’ve already invested over $350,000 into Virginia to strengthen candidate recruitment, voter outreach, and more. We have no intention of slowing down – we’re committed to investing seven-figures into Virginia’s legislative races this year.

---
This is going to be one of the consequential elections of 2025 – one that could decide whether MAGA extremists take control, or whether state Democrats clinch a trifecta and protect everything we’ve been fighting for.

Our candidates are driven, they’re diverse, and they’re _already_ working hard to flip districts and win elections.
---
**And we’re only just getting started...**

[We want you to be a part of something historic. Will you chip in a triple matched gift of $7, or anything you can, to help elect state Democrats everywhere in 2025 and 2026? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDJlBRz_PasGKn-5Y68umRbyEtpFV-EPjteq-ZI12n5XO1eVN0rXoR_fGeWWdXovLIFui01YiqdFIZ6bIXj-rKWrP1KXqrLILiCvwqVmphJCOLn9vf1WMb9P-y7S2LaDtsXg2gtFsdKHpSspysWGNVKaX7S_1rSBOUhSqzZMR7tkqFN7994tXZcFDSYDWWOYWy7CBomI53qYDXWKYHrTr0dpNl5GpUvNHRqcjYs2vf-Lb1gRFfe6TjmEFZHEU6yN53c5p7SjoEXy1qEA20G4Azp7OHfGHvrqG1mrwGSqhYBxKn0KD96Equ0agdjby-zDOEjoGmFH7RSOEZ-PoMO0bjFnx6m5Rxi6QmvSCZUGz_5AKbeNKzihN1tdO8byQKShQApx3Z6SXj7ZQeFlvbXWYNCw/4gs/OSoibHrIQRK72e827VfzKA/h0/h001.K5XjG1M1hQe0P_TeKb5sTAv2zOYjaNrXbeKf4BaRW9k)

[I’ll be blunt: While Republicans will cut Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid to give tax breaks to billionaires, Democrats are defending your earned benefits.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108361387/547674327/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250525_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDExNDk0ZS1iMjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQVbYG8fUgkodp8geeChNtUQL08gHW_ZPcDEdKWWqAM=)
That’s why I’m counting on the grassroots support from Democrats like you to answer Donald Trump’s unprecedented billionaire fundraising haul with a massive [SURGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108361388/547674328/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250525_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDExNDk0ZS1iMjM5LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQVbYG8fUgkodp8geeChNtUQL08gHW_ZPcDEdKWWqAM=) in support of our own.

| Peter,

As a doctor, I know that access to health care and nutrition isn’t a luxury — it’s a basic need. That’s why I’m deeply concerned about the Republican budget that just passed out of the House.

Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill Act” includes more than $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid and food assistance. These cuts would strip working families, children, and seniors of the care and support they count on — just to hand out more tax breaks to billionaires like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos.

| | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.
---

Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

---
SB 125 (Hall / Shofner) protects the right of patients to designate a known blood donor when in need of a transfusion.
This bill is in the Calendars Committee waiting to be placed on the House calendar for a floor vote. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE HOUSE CALENDARS COMMITTEE TO PLACE SB 125 ON THE GENERAL STATE CALENDAR FOR A FLOOR VOTE!**
**1- Email the Calendars Committee Members**

|

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Required to report what we’ve raised
body:
---
Derek, In just a few days, we’ll close the books on our most important FEC fundraising deadline since the last election. When this deadline ends, we will be required to report how much money we’ve raised, along with the number of donations we’ve received. Here is the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking to see our total. If we report a big number with lots of donations, Trump and his allies will see that there is serious opposition to their attempts to hand a giant tax cut to the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us. If we file a weak report, then Trump and Congressional Republicans will assume there’s no meaningful resistance to their agenda. **That’s why this FEC deadline matters. So if you've been looking for something meaningful to do to stop Trump, here it is:** **[Please use this link to make a contribution to the DNC today. By the time you’ve reached this point in the email, lots of Democrats will have pitched in, and they’re counting on you to join them.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250525_3533_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3555_22930333_6_E2v2&akid=3555%2E22930333%2E6_E2v2)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250525_3533_fr&refcode2=3555_22930333_6_E2v2&akid=3555%2E22930333%2E6_E2v2)**

This is a disaster...
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-fema/?source=VPP_20250525_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19959%2E878179%2EKYmuEw) **FACT:** Trump is trying to _defund_ and _abolish_ FEMA, _despite climate related disasters SURGING across the country!_

**FACT:** Trump REMOVED the head of FEMA after he disagreed with Trump about __abolishing__ the agency!

**FACT:** If we don’t all take immediate action to SAVE FEMA, Americans will be left in the _dust_ after natural disasters like wildfires and hurricanes!

[**We need a SURGE of public support for FEMA,_or Trump will abolish the agency and leave all of us without the support we need!_ Please, friend: Add your name to call on Congress to SAVE FEMA!! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-fema/?source=VPP_20250525_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19959%2E878179%2EKYmuEw) | [**ADD MY NAME: CALL ON CONGRESS TO SAVE FEMA FROM TRUMP’S DESTRUCTION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-fema/?source=VPP_20250525_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19959%2E878179%2EKYmuEw)
